Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat. Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.Pullbacks.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section Functions.
  Context {B : bicat_with_pb}.

  Definition pb_obj
             {b₁ b₂ b₃ : B}
             (f : b₁ --> b₃)
             (g : b₂ --> b₃)
    : B
    := pr1 (pr2 B _ _ _ f g).

  Local Notation "f '/≃' g" := (pb_obj f g) (at level 40).

  Definition pb_pr1
             {b₁ b₂ b₃ : B}
             (f : b₁ --> b₃)
             (g : b₂ --> b₃)
    : f /≃ g --> b₁
    := pb_cone_pr1 (pr1 (pr2 B _ _ _ f g)).

  Local Notation "'π₁'" := (pb_pr1 _ _).

  Definition pb_pr2
             {b₁ b₂ b₃ : B}
             (f : b₁ --> b₃)
             (g : b₂ --> b₃)
    : f /≃ g --> b₂
    := pb_cone_pr2 (pr1 (pr2 B _ _ _ f g)).

  Local Notation "'π₂'" := (pb_pr2 _ _).

  Definition pb_cell
             {b₁ b₂ b₃ : B}
             (f : b₁ --> b₃)
             (g : b₂ --> b₃)
    : invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
    := pb_cone_cell (pr1 (pr2 B _ _ _ f g)).

  Definition pb_obj_has_pb_ump
             {b₁ b₂ b₃ : B}
             (f : b₁ --> b₃)
             (g : b₂ --> b₃)
    : has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone (f /≃ g) π₁ π₂ (pb_cell f g))
    := pr2 (pr2 B _ _ _ f g).

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (h₁ · f) (h₂ · g)
B ⟦ a, f /≃ g ⟧

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (h₁ · f) (h₂ · g)
B ⟦ a, f /≃ g ⟧

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (h₁ · f) (h₂ · g)
q:= make_pb_cone a h₁ h₂ γ : pb_cone f g: pb_cone f g
B ⟦ a, f /≃ g ⟧

    exact (pb_ump_mor (pr2 (pr2 B _ _ _ f g)) q).
  Defined.

  Local Notation "h₁ ⊗[ γ ] h₂" := (mor_to_pb_obj h₁ h₂ γ) (at level 10).

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (h₁ · f) (h₂ · g)
invertible_2cell (h₁ ⊗[ γ] h₂ · π₁) h₁

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (h₁ · f) (h₂ · g)
invertible_2cell (h₁ ⊗[ γ] h₂ · π₁) h₁

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (h₁ · f) (h₂ · g)
q:= make_pb_cone a h₁ h₂ γ : pb_cone f g: pb_cone f g
invertible_2cell (h₁ ⊗[ γ] h₂ · π₁) h₁

    exact (pb_ump_mor_pr1 (pr2 (pr2 B _ _ _ f g)) q).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (h₁ · f) (h₂ · g)
invertible_2cell (h₁ ⊗[ γ] h₂ · π₂) h₂

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (h₁ · f) (h₂ · g)
invertible_2cell (h₁ ⊗[ γ] h₂ · π₂) h₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (h₁ · f) (h₂ · g)
q:= make_pb_cone a h₁ h₂ γ : pb_cone f g: pb_cone f g
invertible_2cell (h₁ ⊗[ γ] h₂ · π₂) h₂

    exact (pb_ump_mor_pr2 (pr2 (pr2 B _ _ _ f g)) q).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (h₁ · f) (h₂ · g)
h₁ ⊗[ γ] h₂ ◃ pb_cell f g =
(((lassociator (h₁ ⊗[ γ] h₂) π₁ f
   • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 h₁ h₂ γ ▹ f)) • γ)
 • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 h₁ h₂ γ) ^-1 ▹ g))
• rassociator (h₁ ⊗[ γ] h₂) π₂ g

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (h₁ · f) (h₂ · g)
h₁ ⊗[ γ] h₂ ◃ pb_cell f g =
(((lassociator (h₁ ⊗[ γ] h₂) π₁ f
   • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 h₁ h₂ γ ▹ f)) • γ)
 • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 h₁ h₂ γ) ^-1 ▹ g))
• rassociator (h₁ ⊗[ γ] h₂) π₂ g

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (h₁ · f) (h₂ · g)
q:= make_pb_cone a h₁ h₂ γ : pb_cone f g: pb_cone f g
h₁ ⊗[ γ] h₂ ◃ pb_cell f g =
(((lassociator (h₁ ⊗[ γ] h₂) π₁ f
   • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 h₁ h₂ γ ▹ f)) • γ)
 • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 h₁ h₂ γ) ^-1 ▹ g))
• rassociator (h₁ ⊗[ γ] h₂) π₂ g

    exact (pb_ump_mor_cell (pr2 (pr2 B _ _ _ f g)) q).
  Defined.

  Definition cell_to_pb_obj_homot
             {a b₁ b₂ b₃ : B}
             {f : b₁ --> b₃}
             {g : b₂ --> b₃}
             {h₁ h₂ : a --> f /≃ g}
             (α : h₁ · π₁ ==> h₂ · π₁)
             (β : h₁ · π₂ ==> h₂ · π₂)
    : UU
    := (h₁ ◃ pb_cell f g)
         • lassociator _ _ _
         • (β ▹ g)
         • rassociator _ _ _
       =
       lassociator _ _ _
                   • (α ▹ f)
                   • rassociator _ _ _
                   • (h₂ ◃ pb_cell f g).

  Definition cell_to_pb_obj
             {a b₁ b₂ b₃ : B}
             {f : b₁ --> b₃}
             {g : b₂ --> b₃}
             {h₁ h₂ : a --> f /≃ g}
             (α : h₁ · π₁ ==> h₂ · π₁)
             (β : h₁ · π₂ ==> h₂ · π₂)
             (p : cell_to_pb_obj_homot α β)
    : h₁ ==> h₂
    := pb_ump_cell
         (pr2 (pr2 B _ _ _ f g))
         h₁ h₂
         α β
         p.

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a, f /≃ g ⟧
α: h₁ · π₁ ==> h₂ · π₁
β: h₁ · π₂ ==> h₂ · π₂
p: cell_to_pb_obj_homot α β
cell_to_pb_obj α β p ▹ π₁ = α

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a, f /≃ g ⟧
α: h₁ · π₁ ==> h₂ · π₁
β: h₁ · π₂ ==> h₂ · π₂
p: cell_to_pb_obj_homot α β
cell_to_pb_obj α β p ▹ π₁ = α

    exact (pb_ump_cell_pr1
             (pr2 (pr2 B _ _ _ f g))
             h₁ h₂
             α β
             p).
  Qed.

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a, f /≃ g ⟧
α: h₁ · π₁ ==> h₂ · π₁
β: h₁ · π₂ ==> h₂ · π₂
p: cell_to_pb_obj_homot α β
cell_to_pb_obj α β p ▹ π₂ = β

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a, f /≃ g ⟧
α: h₁ · π₁ ==> h₂ · π₁
β: h₁ · π₂ ==> h₂ · π₂
p: cell_to_pb_obj_homot α β
cell_to_pb_obj α β p ▹ π₂ = β

    exact (pb_ump_cell_pr2
             (pr2 (pr2 B _ _ _ f g))
             h₁ h₂
             α β
             p).
  Qed.

  Definition eq_to_pb_obj
             {a b₁ b₂ b₃ : B}
             {f : b₁ --> b₃}
             {g : b₂ --> b₃}
             {h₁ h₂ : a --> f /≃ g}
             {φ ψ : h₁ ==> h₂}
             {p : cell_to_pb_obj_homot (φ ▹ π₁) (φ ▹ π₂)}
             (φψpr1 : φ ▹ π₁ = ψ ▹ π₁)
             (φψpr2 : φ ▹ π₂ = ψ ▹ π₂)
    : φ = ψ
    := pb_ump_eq
         (pr2 (pr2 B _ _ _ f g))
         h₁ h₂
         (φ ▹ π₁) (φ ▹ π₂)
         p
         φ ψ
         (idpath _) (idpath _)
         (!φψpr1) (!φψpr2).

  Definition help_pb_on_1cell
             {b₁ b₂ c₂ b₃ : B}
             (f : b₁ --> b₃)
             {g₁ : b₂ --> b₃}
             {g₂ : c₂ --> b₃}
             {h : b₂ --> c₂}
             (β : invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂))
    : invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · h · g₂)
    := comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (pb_cell f g₁)
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
               _
               β)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)).

  
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
B ⟦ f /≃ g₁, f /≃ g₂ ⟧

  
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
B ⟦ f /≃ g₁, f /≃ g₂ ⟧

    
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
B ⟦ f /≃ g₁, b₁ ⟧
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
B ⟦ f /≃ g₁, c₂ ⟧
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
invertible_2cell (?h₁ · f) (?h₂ · g₂)

    
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
B ⟦ f /≃ g₁, b₁ ⟧
 exact π₁.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
B ⟦ f /≃ g₁, c₂ ⟧
 exact (π₂ · h).
    
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · h · g₂)
 exact (help_pb_on_1cell f β).
  Defined.

  Local Notation "f /≃₁ β" := (pb_on_1cell f β) (at level 40).

  
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
invertible_2cell (f /≃₁ β · π₁) π₁

  
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
invertible_2cell (f /≃₁ β · π₁) π₁

    apply mor_to_pb_obj_pr1.
  Defined.

  
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
invertible_2cell (f /≃₁ β · π₂) (π₂ · h)

  
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
invertible_2cell (f /≃₁ β · π₂) (π₂ · h)

    apply mor_to_pb_obj_pr2.
  Defined.

  
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_cell f g₂ =
(((((lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₁ f
     • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
   • (π₂ ◃ β)) • lassociator π₂ h g₂)
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1 ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₂

  
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_cell f g₂ =
(((((lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₁ f
     • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
   • (π₂ ◃ β)) • lassociator π₂ h g₂)
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1 ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p:= mor_to_pb_obj_cell π₁ (π₂ · h)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h g₂))): π₁
⊗[ comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h g₂))] (π₂
                                                 · h)
◃ pb_cell f g₂ =
(((lassociator
     (π₁
      ⊗[ comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h
                 g₂))] (π₂ · h)) π₁ f
   • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 π₁ (π₂ · h)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h
                 g₂))) ▹ f))
  • comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h g₂)))
 • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 π₁ (π₂ · h)
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h g₂))))
    ^-1 ▹ g₂))
• rassociator
    (π₁
     ⊗[ comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h g₂))] 
     (π₂ · h)) π₂ g₂
f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_cell f g₂ =
(((((lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₁ f
     • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
   • (π₂ ◃ β)) • lassociator π₂ h g₂)
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1 ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p:= mor_to_pb_obj_cell π₁ (π₂ · h)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h g₂))): π₁
⊗[ comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h g₂))] (π₂
                                                 · h)
◃ pb_cell f g₂ =
(((lassociator
     (π₁
      ⊗[ comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h
                 g₂))] (π₂ · h)) π₁ f
   • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 π₁ (π₂ · h)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h
                 g₂))) ▹ f))
  • (pb_cell f g₁
     • ((π₂ ◃ β) • lassociator π₂ h g₂)))
 • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 π₁ (π₂ · h)
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h g₂))))
    ^-1 ▹ g₂))
• rassociator
    (π₁
     ⊗[ comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h g₂))] 
     (π₂ · h)) π₂ g₂
f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_cell f g₂ =
(((((lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₁ f
     • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
   • (π₂ ◃ β)) • lassociator π₂ h g₂)
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1 ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p:= mor_to_pb_obj_cell π₁ (π₂ · h)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h g₂))): π₁
⊗[ comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h g₂))] (π₂
                                                 · h)
◃ pb_cell f g₂ =
(((lassociator
     (π₁
      ⊗[ comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h
                 g₂))] (π₂ · h)) π₁ f
   • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 π₁ (π₂ · h)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h
                 g₂))) ▹ f))
  • (pb_cell f g₁
     • ((π₂ ◃ β) • lassociator π₂ h g₂)))
 • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 π₁ (π₂ · h)
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h g₂))))
    ^-1 ▹ g₂))
• rassociator
    (π₁
     ⊗[ comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h g₂))] 
     (π₂ · h)) π₂ g₂
(((lassociator
     (π₁
      ⊗[ comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h g₂))] 
      (π₂ · h)) π₁ f
   • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 π₁ (π₂ · h)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h g₂)))
      ▹ f))
  • (pb_cell f g₁ • ((π₂ ◃ β) • lassociator π₂ h g₂)))
 • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 π₁ (π₂ · h)
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h g₂))))
    ^-1 ▹ g₂))
• rassociator
    (π₁
     ⊗[ comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h g₂))] 
     (π₂ · h)) π₂ g₂ =
(((((lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₁ f
     • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
   • (π₂ ◃ β)) • lassociator π₂ h g₂)
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1 ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p:= mor_to_pb_obj_cell π₁ (π₂ · h)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h g₂))): π₁
⊗[ comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h g₂))] (π₂
                                                 · h)
◃ pb_cell f g₂ =
(((lassociator
     (π₁
      ⊗[ comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h
                 g₂))] (π₂ · h)) π₁ f
   • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 π₁ (π₂ · h)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h
                 g₂))) ▹ f))
  • (pb_cell f g₁
     • ((π₂ ◃ β) • lassociator π₂ h g₂)))
 • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 π₁ (π₂ · h)
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h g₂))))
    ^-1 ▹ g₂))
• rassociator
    (π₁
     ⊗[ comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h g₂))] 
     (π₂ · h)) π₂ g₂
lassociator
  (π₁
   ⊗[ comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h g₂))] 
   (π₂ · h)) π₁ f
• ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 π₁ (π₂ · h)
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_cell f g₁)
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell π₂ β)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ h g₂)))
    ▹ f)
   • (pb_cell f g₁
      • ((π₂ ◃ β)
         • (lassociator π₂ h g₂
            • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 π₁ (π₂ · h)
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (pb_cell f g₁)
                      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                            π₂ β)
                         (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                            π₂ h g₂)))) ^-1 ▹ g₂)
               • rassociator
                   (π₁
                    ⊗[ comp_of_invertible_2cell
                         (pb_cell f g₁)
                         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                               π₂ β)
                            (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                               π₂ h g₂))] (π₂ · h)) π₂
                   g₂))))) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₁ f
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f)
   • (pb_cell f g₁
      • ((π₂ ◃ β)
         • (lassociator π₂ h g₂
            • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1 ▹ g₂)
               • rassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₂)))))

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Section PBOn2Cell.
    Context {b₁ b₂ c₂ b₃ : B}
            (f : b₁ --> b₃)
            {g₁ : b₂ --> b₃}
            {g₂ : c₂ --> b₃}
            {h₁ h₂ : b₂ --> c₂}
            {β₁ : invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)}
            {β₂ : invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)}
            {α : h₁ ==> h₂}
            (p : β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂).

    Let k₁ : f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
      := pb_on_1cell_pr1 _ _ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 _ _)^-1.

    Let k₂ : f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
      := pb_on_1cell_pr2 _ _ • (π₂ ◃ α) • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 _ _)^-1.

    
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
cell_to_pb_obj_homot k₁ k₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
cell_to_pb_obj_homot k₁ k₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
(((f /≃₁ β₁ ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ β₁) π₂ g₂)
 • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
     • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1) ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ β₂) π₂ g₂ =
((lassociator (f /≃₁ β₁) π₁ f
  • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1) ▹ f))
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ β₂) π₁ f)
• (f /≃₁ β₂ ◃ pb_cell f g₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
((((((((lassociator (f /≃₁ β₁) π₁ f
        • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
      • (π₂ ◃ β₁)) • lassociator π₂ h₁ g₂)
    • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁) ^-1 ▹ g₂))
   • rassociator (f /≃₁ β₁) π₂ g₂)
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ β₁) π₂ g₂)
 • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
     • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1) ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ β₂) π₂ g₂ =
((lassociator (f /≃₁ β₁) π₁ f
  • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1) ▹ f))
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ β₂) π₁ f)
• (f /≃₁ β₂ ◃ pb_cell f g₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
((((((((lassociator (f /≃₁ β₁) π₁ f
        • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
      • (π₂ ◃ β₁)) • lassociator π₂ h₁ g₂)
    • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁) ^-1 ▹ g₂))
   • rassociator (f /≃₁ β₁) π₂ g₂)
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ β₁) π₂ g₂)
 • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ ▹ g₂) • ((π₂ ◃ α) ▹ g₂))
    • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1 ▹ g₂)))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ β₂) π₂ g₂ =
((lassociator (f /≃₁ β₁) π₁ f
  • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ ▹ f)
     • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1 ▹ f)))
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ β₂) π₁ f)
• (f /≃₁ β₂ ◃ pb_cell f g₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
lassociator (f /≃₁ β₁) π₁ f
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ ▹ f)
   • (pb_cell f g₁
      • ((π₂ ◃ β₁)
         • (lassociator π₂ h₁ g₂
            • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁) ^-1 ▹ g₂)
               • (rassociator (f /≃₁ β₁) π₂ g₂
                  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ β₁) π₂ g₂
                     • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ ▹ g₂)
                        • (((π₂ ◃ α) ▹ g₂)
                           • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂)
                               ^-1 ▹ g₂)
                              • rassociator (f /≃₁ β₂)
                                  π₂ g₂)))))))))) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ β₁) π₁ f
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ ▹ f)
   • (((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1 ▹ f)
      • (rassociator (f /≃₁ β₂) π₁ f
         • (f /≃₁ β₂ ◃ pb_cell f g₂))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
pb_cell f g₁

((id₂ (π₂ · h₁ · g₂) • ((π₂ ◃ α) ▹ g₂))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1 ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ β₂) π₂ g₂ = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
(((π₂ ◃ α) ▹ g₂) • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1 ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ β₂) π₂ g₂ = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
pb_cell f g₁
• ((π₂ ◃ β₁)
   • (lassociator π₂ h₁ g₂
      • ((((π₂ ◃ α) ▹ g₂)
          • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1 ▹ g₂))
         • rassociator (f /≃₁ β₂) π₂ g₂))) =
((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1 ▹ f)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ β₂) π₁ f
   • (f /≃₁ β₂ ◃ pb_cell f g₂))

pb_cell f g₁
• ((π₂ ◃ β₁)
   • (lassociator π₂ h₁ g₂
      • (((π₂ ◃ α) ▹ g₂)
         • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1 ▹ g₂)
            • rassociator (f /≃₁ β₂) π₂ g₂)))) =
((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1 ▹ f)

   • (f /≃₁ β₂ ◃ pb_cell f g₂))

           • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂ ▹ f))
          • pb_cell f g₁) • (π₂ ◃ β₂))
        • lassociator π₂ h₂ g₂)

h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
(((((((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1 ▹ f)
     • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂ ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
   • (π₂ ◃ β₂)) • lassociator π₂ h₂ g₂)
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1 ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ β₂) π₂ g₂ =
((((pb_cell f g₁ • (π₂ ◃ β₁)) • lassociator π₂ h₁ g₂)
  • ((π₂ ◃ α) ▹ g₂))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1 ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ β₂) π₂ g₂

b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B

β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
(((((((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1
      • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ▹ f) • pb_cell f g₁)
   • (π₂ ◃ β₂)) • lassociator π₂ h₂ g₂)
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1 ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ β₂) π₂ g₂ =
((((pb_cell f g₁ • (π₂ ◃ β₁)) • lassociator π₂ h₁ g₂)
  • ((π₂ ◃ α) ▹ g₂))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1 ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ β₂) π₂ g₂

b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧

β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂

k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
(((((id₂ π₁ ▹ f) • pb_cell f g₁) • (π₂ ◃ β₂))
  • lassociator π₂ h₂ g₂)
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1 ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ β₂) π₂ g₂ =
((((pb_cell f g₁ • (π₂ ◃ β₁)) • lassociator π₂ h₁ g₂)
  • ((π₂ ◃ α) ▹ g₂))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1 ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ β₂) π₂ g₂

 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1 ▹ g₂))

  • ((π₂ ◃ α) ▹ g₂))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1 ▹ g₂))

(((pb_cell f g₁ • (π₂ ◃ β₂)) • lassociator π₂ h₂ g₂)

B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
pb_cell f g₁
• ((π₂ ◃ β₂)
   • (lassociator π₂ h₂ g₂
      • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1 ▹ g₂)
         • rassociator (f /≃₁ β₂) π₂ g₂))) =
pb_cell f g₁
• ((π₂ ◃ β₁)
   • (lassociator π₂ h₁ g₂
      • (((π₂ ◃ α) ▹ g₂)
         • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1 ▹ g₂)
            • rassociator (f /≃₁ β₂) π₂ g₂))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
(π₂ ◃ β₂)
• (lassociator π₂ h₂ g₂
   • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1 ▹ g₂)
      • rassociator (f /≃₁ β₂) π₂ g₂)) =
(π₂ ◃ β₁)
• (lassociator π₂ h₁ g₂
   • (((π₂ ◃ α) ▹ g₂)
      • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1 ▹ g₂)
         • rassociator (f /≃₁ β₂) π₂ g₂)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
(((π₂ ◃ β₂) • lassociator π₂ h₂ g₂)
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1 ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ β₂) π₂ g₂ =
((((π₂ ◃ β₁) • lassociator π₂ h₁ g₂) • ((π₂ ◃ α) ▹ g₂))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1 ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ β₂) π₂ g₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
(π₂ ◃ β₂) • lassociator π₂ h₂ g₂ =
((π₂ ◃ β₁) • lassociator π₂ h₁ g₂) • ((π₂ ◃ α) ▹ g₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
(π₂ ◃ β₂) • lassociator π₂ h₂ g₂ =
(π₂ ◃ β₁) • (lassociator π₂ h₁ g₂ • ((π₂ ◃ α) ▹ g₂))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
(π₂ ◃ β₂) • lassociator π₂ h₂ g₂ =
(π₂ ◃ β₁) • ((π₂ ◃ (α ▹ g₂)) • lassociator π₂ h₂ g₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
(π₂ ◃ β₂) • lassociator π₂ h₂ g₂ =
((π₂ ◃ β₁) • (π₂ ◃ (α ▹ g₂))) • lassociator π₂ h₂ g₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
π₂ ◃ β₂ = (π₂ ◃ β₁) • (π₂ ◃ (α ▹ g₂))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
π₂ ◃ β₂ = π₂ ◃ (β₁ • (α ▹ g₂))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
β₂ = β₁ • (α ▹ g₂)

      exact (!p).
    Qed.

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧

β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
f /≃₁ β₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂

k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))

g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
cell_to_pb_obj_homot ?α ?β

      
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
 exact k₁.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
 exact k₂.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
cell_to_pb_obj_homot k₁ k₂
 exact pb_on_2cell_homot.
    Defined.

    
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
pb_on_2cell ▹ π₁ = k₁

    
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
pb_on_2cell ▹ π₁ = k₁

      apply cell_to_pb_obj_pr1.
    Qed.

    
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
pb_on_2cell ▹ π₂ = k₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
b₁, b₂, c₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ c₂, b₃ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
β₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
α: h₁ ==> h₂
p: β₁ • (α ▹ g₂) = β₂
k₁:= pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₁
k₂:= (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ α))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1: f /≃₁ β₁ · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ β₂ · π₂
pb_on_2cell ▹ π₂ = k₂

      apply cell_to_pb_obj_pr2.
    Qed.
  End PBOn2Cell.

  Local Notation "f /≃₂ p" := (pb_on_2cell f p) (at level 40).

  Section PBOnId.
    Context {a b₁ b₂ : B}
            (f : b₁ --> b₂)
            (g : a --> b₂).

    Let k₁ : id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₁
      := lunitor _ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 _ _)^-1.

    Let k₂ : id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₂
      := lunitor _ • rinvunitor _ • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 _ _)^-1.

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
k₁:= lunitor π₁
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₁ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₁
k₂:= (lunitor π₂ • rinvunitor π₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₂ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₂
cell_to_pb_obj_homot k₁ k₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
k₁:= lunitor π₁
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₁ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₁
k₂:= (lunitor π₂ • rinvunitor π₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₂ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₂
cell_to_pb_obj_homot k₁ k₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
k₁:= lunitor π₁
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₁ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₁
k₂:= (lunitor π₂ • rinvunitor π₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₂ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₂
(((id₁ (f /≃ g) ◃ pb_cell f g)
  • lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g)) π₂ g)
 • (((lunitor π₂ • rinvunitor π₂)
     • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1) ▹ g))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g) π₂
    g =
((lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g)) π₁ f
  • ((lunitor π₁
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1) ▹ f))
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)
     π₁ f)
• (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g ◃ pb_cell f g)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
k₁:= lunitor π₁
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₁ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₁
k₂:= (lunitor π₂ • rinvunitor π₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₂ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₂
(((id₁ (f /≃ g) ◃ pb_cell f g)
  • lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g)) π₂ g)
 • (((lunitor π₂ ▹ g) • (rinvunitor π₂ ▹ g))
    • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1 ▹ g)))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g) π₂
    g =
((lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g)) π₁ f
  • ((lunitor π₁ ▹ f)
     • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1 ▹ f)))
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)
     π₁ f)
• (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g ◃ pb_cell f g)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
k₁:= lunitor π₁
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₁ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₁
k₂:= (lunitor π₂ • rinvunitor π₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₂ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₂
(id₁ (f /≃ g) ◃ pb_cell f g)
• (lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g)) π₂ g
   • ((lunitor π₂ ▹ g)
      • ((rinvunitor π₂ ▹ g)
         • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1
             ▹ g)
            • rassociator
                (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)
                π₂ g)))) =
lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g)) π₁ f
• ((lunitor π₁ ▹ f)
   • (((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1 ▹ f)
      • (rassociator
           (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g) π₁ f
         • (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g
            ◃ pb_cell f g))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
k₁:= lunitor π₁
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₁ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₁
k₂:= (lunitor π₂ • rinvunitor π₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₂ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₂
p:= pb_on_1cell_cell f (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g): f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g ◃ pb_cell f g =
(((((lassociator
       (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g) π₁ f
     • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g) ▹ f))
    • pb_cell f g)
   • (π₂ ◃ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g))
  • lassociator π₂ (id₁ a) g)
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1 ▹ g))
• rassociator
    (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g) π₂ g
(id₁ (f /≃ g) ◃ pb_cell f g)
• (lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g)) π₂ g
   • ((lunitor π₂ ▹ g)
      • ((rinvunitor π₂ ▹ g)
         • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1
             ▹ g)
            • rassociator
                (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)
                π₂ g)))) =
lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g)) π₁ f
• ((lunitor π₁ ▹ f)
   • (((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1 ▹ f)
      • (rassociator
           (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g) π₁ f
         • (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g
            ◃ pb_cell f g))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
k₁:= lunitor π₁
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₁ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₁
k₂:= (lunitor π₂ • rinvunitor π₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₂ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₂
p:= pb_on_1cell_cell f (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g): f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g ◃ pb_cell f g =
(((((lassociator
       (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g) π₁ f
     • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g) ▹ f))
    • pb_cell f g) • (π₂ ◃ linvunitor g))
  • lassociator π₂ (id₁ a) g)
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1 ▹ g))
• rassociator
    (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g) π₂ g
(id₁ (f /≃ g) ◃ pb_cell f g)
• (lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g)) π₂ g
   • ((lunitor π₂ ▹ g)
      • ((rinvunitor π₂ ▹ g)
         • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1
             ▹ g)
            • rassociator
                (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)
                π₂ g)))) =
lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g)) π₁ f
• ((lunitor π₁ ▹ f)
   • (((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1 ▹ f)
      • (rassociator
           (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g) π₁ f
         • (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g
            ◃ pb_cell f g))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
k₁:= lunitor π₁
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₁ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₁
k₂:= (lunitor π₂ • rinvunitor π₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₂ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₂
p:= pb_on_1cell_cell f (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g): f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g ◃ pb_cell f g =
(((((lassociator
       (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g) π₁ f
     • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g) ▹ f))
    • pb_cell f g) • (π₂ ◃ linvunitor g))
  • lassociator π₂ (id₁ a) g)
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1 ▹ g))
• rassociator
    (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g) π₂ g
(id₁ (f /≃ g) ◃ pb_cell f g)
• (lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g)) π₂ g
   • ((lunitor π₂ ▹ g)
      • ((rinvunitor π₂ ▹ g)
         • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1
             ▹ g)
            • rassociator
                (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)
                π₂ g)))) =
lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g)) π₁ f
• ((lunitor π₁ ▹ f)
   • (((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1 ▹ f)
      • (rassociator
           (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g) π₁ f
         • ((((((lassociator
                   (f /≃₁
                    linvunitor_invertible_2cell g) π₁
                   f
                 • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)
                    ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g)
               • (π₂ ◃ linvunitor g))
              • lassociator π₂ (id₁ a) g)
             • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g))
                ^-1 ▹ g))
            • rassociator
                (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)
                π₂ g))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
k₁:= lunitor π₁

                          linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            g) π₂ g))))))) =
(id₁ (f /≃ g) ◃ pb_cell f g)
• (lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g)) π₂ g
   • ((lunitor π₂ ▹ g)

                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1
             ▹ g)
            • rassociator
                (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)
                π₂ g))))

(((((id₁ (f /≃ g) ◃ pb_cell f g)
    • lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g)) π₂ g)
   • (lunitor π₂ ▹ g)) • (rinvunitor π₂ ▹ g))

    ^-1 ▹ g))

    g

B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
k₁:= lunitor π₁
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₁ ==>

     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₂ ==>

p:= pb_on_1cell_cell f (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g): f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g ◃ pb_cell f g =

     • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g) ▹ f))
    • pb_cell f g) • (π₂ ◃ linvunitor g))
  • lassociator π₂ (id₁ a) g)
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1 ▹ g))
• rassociator
    (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g) π₂ g
rinvunitor π₂ ▹ g = rinvunitor π₂ ▹ g

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
k₁:= lunitor π₁
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₁ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₁
k₂:= (lunitor π₂ • rinvunitor π₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₂ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₂
id₁ (f /≃ g) ==> f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g

     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₁ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₁
k₂:= (lunitor π₂ • rinvunitor π₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₂ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₂
id₁ (f /≃ g) ==> f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g

     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₂ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₂

f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₂
cell_to_pb_obj_homot ?α ?β

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
k₁:= lunitor π₁
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₁ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₁
k₂:= (lunitor π₂ • rinvunitor π₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₂ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₂
id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₁ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₁
 exact k₁.

g: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧

f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₁

cell_to_pb_obj_homot k₁ k₂
 exact pb_1cell_on_id_homot.
    Defined.

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
k₁:= lunitor π₁
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₁ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₁
k₂:= (lunitor π₂ • rinvunitor π₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₂ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₂
pb_1cell_on_id ▹ π₁ = k₁

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
k₁:= lunitor π₁
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₁ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₁
k₂:= (lunitor π₂ • rinvunitor π₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₂ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₂
pb_1cell_on_id ▹ π₁ = k₁

      apply cell_to_pb_obj_pr1.
    Qed.

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
k₁:= lunitor π₁
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₁ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₁
k₂:= (lunitor π₂ • rinvunitor π₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₂ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₂
pb_1cell_on_id ▹ π₂ = k₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
k₁:= lunitor π₁
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₁ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₁
k₂:= (lunitor π₂ • rinvunitor π₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1: id₁ (f /≃ g) · π₂ ==>
f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g · π₂
pb_1cell_on_id ▹ π₂ = k₂

      apply cell_to_pb_obj_pr2.
    Qed.
  End PBOnId.

  Section PBOnComp.
    Context {a₁ a₂ a₃ b₁ b₂ : B}
            (f : b₁ --> b₂)
            {g₁ : a₁ --> b₂}
            {g₂ : a₂ --> b₂}
            {g₃ : a₃ --> b₂}
            {h₁ : a₁ --> a₂}
            {h₂ : a₂ --> a₃}
            (α : invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂))
            (β : invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)).

    Let γ : invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
      := comp_of_invertible_2cell
           α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell _ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)).

    Let k₁ : f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
      := rassociator _ _ _
                     • (_ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 _ _)
                     • pb_on_1cell_pr1 _ _
                     • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 _ _)^-1.
    Let k₂ : f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
      := rassociator _ _ _
                     • (_ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 _ _)
                     • lassociator _ _ _
                     • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 _ _ ▹ _)
                     • rassociator _ _ _
                     • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 _ _)^-1.

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
cell_to_pb_obj_homot k₁ k₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
cell_to_pb_obj_homot k₁ k₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(((f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃)
 • ((((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
         • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
        • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
       • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
      • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
     • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1) ▹ g₃))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₂ g₃ =
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₁ f
  • ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
        • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
       • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1) ▹ f))
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f)
• (f /≃₁ γ ◃ pb_cell f g₃)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(((f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃)
 • ((((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃)
        • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃))
       • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
     • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃))
    • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1 ▹ g₃)))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₂ g₃ =
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₁ f
  • ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f)
       • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f))
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f))
     • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1 ▹ f)))
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f)
• (f /≃₁ γ ◃ pb_cell f g₃)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(((f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃)
 • ((((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃)
        • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃))
       • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
     • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃))
    • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1 ▹ g₃)))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₂ g₃ =
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₁ f
  • ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f)
       • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f))
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f))
     • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1 ▹ f)))
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f)
• ((((((lassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
        • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
      • (π₂ ◃ γ)) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃)
    • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1 ▹ g₃))
   • rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₂ g₃)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((((((((f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
       • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃)
      • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃))
     • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃))
    • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
  • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1 ▹ g₃))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₂ g₃ =
(((((((((((lassociator (... · ...) π₁ f
           • (rassociator ... ... π₁ ▹ f))
          • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f))
         • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f))
        • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1 ▹ f))
       • rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f)
      • lassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f)
     • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
   • (π₂ ◃ γ)) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃)
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1 ▹ g₃))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₂ g₃

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((((((f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
     • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃)
    • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃))
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃))
  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
• (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃) =
(((((((((lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₁ f
         • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f))
        • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f))
       • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f))
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1 ▹ f))
     • rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f)
    • lassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f)
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
 • (π₂ ◃ γ)) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃
   • ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃)
      • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃)
         • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
            • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃)
               • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃)))))) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₁ f
• ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f)
   • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
         • (((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1 ▹ f)
            • (rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
               • (lassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
                  • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ ▹ f)
                     • (pb_cell f g₁
                        • ((π₂ ◃ γ)
                           • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂)
                               g₃)))))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₁ f
• ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f)
   • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
         • (((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1 ▹ f)
            • (rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
               • (lassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
                  • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ ▹ f)
                     • (pb_cell f g₁
                        • ((π₂ ◃ γ)
                           • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂)
                               g₃))))))))) =
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃
   • ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃)
      • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃)
         • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
            • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃)
               • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₁ f
• ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f)
   • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
         • (((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1 ▹ f)
            • (rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
               • (lassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
                  • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ ▹ f)
                     • (pb_cell f g₁
                        • ((π₂ ◃ γ)
                           • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂)
                               g₃))))))))) = ?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
?b =
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃
   • ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃)
      • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃)
         • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
            • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃)
               • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₁ f
• ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f)
   • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
         • (((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1 ▹ f)
            • (rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
               • (lassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
                  • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ ▹ f)
                     • (pb_cell f g₁
                        • ((π₂ ◃ γ)
                           • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂)
                               g₃))))))))) = ?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ ▹ f)
      • (pb_cell f g₁
         • ((π₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃)))) =
?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((((rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
    • lassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f)
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
 • (π₂ ◃ γ)) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃ = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(((id₂ (f /≃₁ γ · π₁ · f) • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ ▹ f))
  • pb_cell f g₁) • (π₂ ◃ γ))
• lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃ = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ ▹ f) • pb_cell f g₁) • (π₂ ◃ γ))
• lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃ = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ ▹ f)
• (pb_cell f g₁
   • ((π₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃)) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₁ f
• ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f)
   • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
         • (((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1 ▹ f)
            • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ ▹ f)
               • (pb_cell f g₁
                  • ((π₂ ◃ γ)
                     • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃))))))) =
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃
   • ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃)
      • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃)
         • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
            • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃)
               • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₁ f
• ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f)
   • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
         • (((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1 ▹ f)
            • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ ▹ f)
               • (pb_cell f g₁
                  • ((π₂ ◃ γ)
                     • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃))))))) =
?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
?b =
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃
   • ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃)
      • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃)
         • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
            • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃)
               • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃))))))

 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)

lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₁ f
• ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f)
   • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
         • (((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1 ▹ f)
            • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ ▹ f)
               • (pb_cell f g₁
                  • ((π₂ ◃ γ)
                     • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃))))))) =
?b

((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1 ▹ f)
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ ▹ f)
