  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(((id₂ π₁ ▹ f) • pb_cell f g₁) • (π₂ ◃ γ))
• lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃ = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((id₂ (π₁ · f) • pb_cell f g₁) • (π₂ ◃ γ))
• lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃ = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧

β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)

  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(pb_cell f g₁ • (π₂ ◃ γ))
• lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃ = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
pb_cell f g₁
• ((π₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₁ f
• ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f)
   • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
         • (pb_cell f g₁
            • ((π₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃))))) =
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃
   • ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃)
      • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃)
         • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
            • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃)
               • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (π₁ · f)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₁ f
   • ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f)
      • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
            • (pb_cell f g₁
               • ((π₂ ◃ γ)
                  • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃)))))) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (π₁ · f)
• ((f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃
      • ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃)
         • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃)
            • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
               • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃)
                  • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃)))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((((((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (π₁ · f)
      • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₁ f)
     • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f))
    • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f))
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
 • (π₂ ◃ γ)) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃ =
((((((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (π₁ · f)
      • (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_cell f g₃))
     • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃)
    • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃))
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃))
  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
• (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((((((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (π₁ · f)
      • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₁ f)
     • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f))
    • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f))
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
 • (π₂ ◃ γ)) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃ =
(((((((f /≃₁ α ◃ (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_cell f g₃))
      • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (π₂ · g₃))
     • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃)
    • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃))
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃))
  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
• (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((((((((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₁ f)
       • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₁) f)
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f))
     • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f))
    • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f))
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
 • (π₂ ◃ γ)) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃ =
(((((((f /≃₁ α ◃ (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_cell f g₃))
      • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (π₂ · g₃))
     • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃)
    • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃))
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃))
  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
• (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((((((((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₁ f)
       • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₁) f)
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f))
     • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f))
    • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f))
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
 • (π₂ ◃ γ)) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃ =
(((((((f /≃₁ α
       ◃ ((((((...) • pb_cell f g₂) • (π₂ ◃ β))
            • lassociator π₂ h₂ g₃)
           • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1 ▹ g₃))
          • rassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃))
      • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (π₂ · g₃))
     • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃)
    • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃))
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃))
  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
• (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((((((((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₁ f)
       • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₁) f)
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f))
     • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f))
    • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f))
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
 • (π₂ ◃ γ)) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃ =
(((((((((((((...) • (...)) • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂))
          • (f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β)))
         • (f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator π₂ h₂ g₃))
        • (f /≃₁ α ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1 ▹ g₃)))
       • (f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃))
      • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (π₂ · g₃))
     • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃)
    • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃))
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃))
  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
• (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₁ f)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₁) f
   • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f)
      • ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f)
         • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
            • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
               • (pb_cell f g₁
                  • ((π₂ ◃ γ)
                     • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃))))))) =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₁ f)
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f))
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
      • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
         • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator π₂ h₂ g₃)
            • ((f /≃₁ α
                ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1 ▹ g₃))
               • ((f /≃₁ α
                   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃)
                  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β)
                       (π₂ · g₃)
                     • (lassociator
                          (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃
                        • ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α)
                              (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃)
                           • (((f /≃₁ α
                                ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
                               ▹ g₃)
                              • ((lassociator ... π₂
                                    h₂ ▹ g₃)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₁) f
• ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f)
   • ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f)
      • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
            • (pb_cell f g₁
               • ((π₂ ◃ γ)
                  • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃)))))) =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
      • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator π₂ h₂ g₃)
         • ((f /≃₁ α
             ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1 ▹ g₃))
            • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃)
               • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β)
                    (π₂ · g₃)
                  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β))
                       π₂ g₃
                     • ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α)
                           (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃)
                        • (((f /≃₁ α
                             ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
                            ▹ g₃)
                           • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α)
                                 π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
                              • (((...) ▹ g₃)
                                 • (rassociator π₂ h₁
                                      h₂ ▹ g₃))))))))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₁) f
• ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f)
   • ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f)
      • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
            • (pb_cell f g₁
               • ((π₂ ◃ γ)
                  • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃)))))) =
?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
?b =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
      • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator π₂ h₂ g₃)
         • ((f /≃₁ α
             ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1 ▹ g₃))
            • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃)
               • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β)
                    (π₂ · g₃)
                  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β))
                       π₂ g₃
                     • ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α)
                           (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃)
                        • (((f /≃₁ α
                             ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
                            ▹ g₃)
                           • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α)
                                 π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
                              • (((...) ▹ g₃)
                                 • (rassociator π₂ h₁
                                      h₂ ▹ g₃))))))))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₁) f
• ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f)
   • ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f)
      • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
            • (pb_cell f g₁
               • ((π₂ ◃ γ)
                  • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃)))))) =
?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f)
• ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f)
   • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
         • (pb_cell f g₁
            • ((π₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃))))) =
?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((((((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f)
     • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ ▹ f))
    • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f))
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
 • (π₂ ◃ γ)) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃ = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((((((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
      • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁) ▹ f)
    • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f))
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
 • (π₂ ◃ γ)) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃ = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(((((id₂ (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · π₁)) ▹ f)
    • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f))
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
 • (π₂ ◃ γ)) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃ = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((((id₂ (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · π₁) · f)
    • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f))
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
 • (π₂ ◃ γ)) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃ = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
 • (π₂ ◃ γ)) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃ = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
   • (pb_cell f g₁
      • ((π₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃))) =
?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₁) f
• (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
      • (pb_cell f g₁
         • ((π₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃)))) =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
      • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator π₂ h₂ g₃)
         • ((f /≃₁ α
             ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1 ▹ g₃))
            • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃)
               • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β)
                    (π₂ · g₃)
                  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β))
                       π₂ g₃
                     • ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α)
                           (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃)
                        • (((f /≃₁ α
                             ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
                            ▹ g₃)
                           • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α)
                                 π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
                              • (((...) ▹ g₃)
                                 • (rassociator π₂ h₁
                                      h₂ ▹ g₃))))))))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
      • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator π₂ h₂ g₃)
         • ((f /≃₁ α
             ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1 ▹ g₃))
            • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃)
               • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β)
                    (π₂ · g₃)
                  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β))
                       π₂ g₃
                     • ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α)
                           (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃)
                        • (((f /≃₁ α
                             ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
                            ▹ g₃)
                           • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α)
                                 π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
                              • (((...) ▹ g₃)
                                 • (rassociator π₂ h₁
                                      h₂ ▹ g₃)))))))))))) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₁) f
• (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
      • (pb_cell f g₁
         • ((π₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
      • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator π₂ h₂ g₃)
         • ((f /≃₁ α
             ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1 ▹ g₃))
            • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃)
               • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β)
                    (π₂ · g₃)
                  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β))
                       π₂ g₃
                     • ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α)
                           (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃)
                        • (((f /≃₁ α
                             ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
                            ▹ g₃)
                           • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α)
                                 π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
                              • (((...) ▹ g₃)
                                 • (rassociator π₂ h₁
                                      h₂ ▹ g₃)))))))))))) =
?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
?b =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₁) f
• (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
      • (pb_cell f g₁
         • ((π₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
      • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator π₂ h₂ g₃)
         • ((f /≃₁ α
             ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1 ▹ g₃))
            • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃)
               • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β)
                    (π₂ · g₃)
                  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β))
                       π₂ g₃
                     • ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α)
                           (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃)
                        • (((f /≃₁ α
                             ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
                            ▹ g₃)
                           • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α)
                                 π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
                              • (((...) ▹ g₃)
                                 • (rassociator π₂ h₁
                                      h₂ ▹ g₃)))))))))))) =
?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (π₂ · g₃)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃
   • ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃)
      • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃)
         • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
            • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃)
               • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃)))))) =
?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(((((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (π₂ · g₃)
     • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃)
    • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃))
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃))
  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
• (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(((((((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃)
      • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₂) g₃)
     • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃))
    • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃))
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃))
  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
• (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃)
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₂) g₃)
 • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃))
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃) = ?y'

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₂) g₃
   • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃)
      • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ g₃))) =
?y'

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₂) g₃
   • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
       • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂) ▹ g₃)) =
?y'

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₂) g₃
   • (id₂ (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · π₂)) ▹ g₃)) = ?y'

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₂) g₃
   • id₂ (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · π₂) · g₃)) = ?y'

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃)
• lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₂) g₃ = ?y'

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
      • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator π₂ h₂ g₃)
         • ((f /≃₁ α
             ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1 ▹ g₃))
            • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃)
               • ((((((f /≃₁ α
                       ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃)
                      • lassociator (f /≃₁ α)
                          (f /≃₁ β · π₂) g₃)
                     • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
                        ▹ g₃))
                    • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
                       ▹ g₃))
                   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
                  • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃))))))) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₁) f
• (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
      • (pb_cell f g₁
         • ((π₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
      • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator π₂ h₂ g₃)
         • ((f /≃₁ α
             ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1 ▹ g₃))
            • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃)
               • ((((((f /≃₁ α
                       ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃)
                      • lassociator (f /≃₁ α)
                          (f /≃₁ β · π₂) g₃)
                     • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
                        ▹ g₃))
                    • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
                       ▹ g₃))
                   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
                  • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃))))))) =
?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
?b =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₁) f
• (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
      • (pb_cell f g₁
         • ((π₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
      • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator π₂ h₂ g₃)
         • ((f /≃₁ α
             ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1 ▹ g₃))
            • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃)
               • ((((((f /≃₁ α
                       ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃)
                      • lassociator (f /≃₁ α)
                          (f /≃₁ β · π₂) g₃)
                     • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
                        ▹ g₃))
                    • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
                       ▹ g₃))
                   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
                  • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃))))))) =
?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃)
• ((((((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃)
       • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₂) g₃)
      • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃))
     • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
    • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
   • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃)) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((((((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃)
     • (f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃))
    • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₂) g₃)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃))
  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
• (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(((((f /≃₁ α
     ◃ (rassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃
        • lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ g₃))
    • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₂) g₃)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃))
  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
• (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(((((f /≃₁ α ◃ id₂ (f /≃₁ β · π₂ · g₃))
    • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₂) g₃)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃))
  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
• (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((((id₂ (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · π₂ · g₃))
    • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₂) g₃)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃))
  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
• (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₂) g₃
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃))
  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
• (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₂) g₃
• (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃)
   • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
      • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃)
         • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃)))) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
      • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator π₂ h₂ g₃)
         • ((f /≃₁ α
             ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1 ▹ g₃))
            • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₂) g₃
               • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
                   ▹ g₃)
                  • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
                     • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
                         ▹ g₃)
                        • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃))))))))) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₁) f
• (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
      • (pb_cell f g₁
         • ((π₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
      • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator π₂ h₂ g₃)
         • ((f /≃₁ α
             ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1 ▹ g₃))
            • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₂) g₃
               • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
                   ▹ g₃)
                  • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
                     • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
                         ▹ g₃)
                        • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃))))))))) =
?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
?b =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₁) f
• (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
      • (pb_cell f g₁
         • ((π₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
      • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator π₂ h₂ g₃)
         • ((f /≃₁ α
             ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1 ▹ g₃))
            • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₂) g₃
               • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
                   ▹ g₃)
                  • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
                     • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
                         ▹ g₃)
                        • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃))))))))) =
?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1 ▹ g₃))
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₂) g₃
   • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃)
      • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
         • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃)
            • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃))))) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(((((f /≃₁ α ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1 ▹ g₃))
    • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₂) g₃)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃))
  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
• (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (π₂ · h₂) g₃
    • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1) ▹ g₃))
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃))
  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
• (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (π₂ · h₂) g₃
• (((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1) ▹ g₃)
   • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃)
      • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
         • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃)
            • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃))))) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1) ▹ g₃)
• (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃)
   • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
      • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃)
         • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃)))) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(((((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1) ▹ g₃)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ g₃))
  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
• (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(((((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1)
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)) ▹ g₃)
  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
• (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((((f /≃₁ α
    ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1 • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   ▹ g₃) • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
• (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((((f /≃₁ α ◃ id₂ (π₂ · h₂)) ▹ g₃)
  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
• (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb

h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(((id₂ (f /≃₁ α · (π₂ · h₂)) ▹ g₃)
  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
• (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁

    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((id₂ (f /≃₁ α · (π₂ · h₂) · g₃)
  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
• (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃) = ?t2

  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)

    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)

((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
