B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
• (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃)
   • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃)) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
      • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator π₂ h₂ g₃)
         • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (π₂ · h₂) g₃
            • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
               • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃)
                  • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃))))))) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₁) f
• (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
      • (pb_cell f g₁
         • ((π₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
      • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator π₂ h₂ g₃)
         • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (π₂ · h₂) g₃
            • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
               • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃)
                  • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃))))))) =
?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
?b =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₁) f
• (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
      • (pb_cell f g₁
         • ((π₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
      • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator π₂ h₂ g₃)
         • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (π₂ · h₂) g₃
            • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
               • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃)
                  • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃))))))) =
?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator π₂ h₂ g₃)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (π₂ · h₂) g₃
   • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃)
      • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃)
         • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃)))) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator π₂ h₂ g₃)
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (π₂ · h₂) g₃)
  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ g₃))
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
• (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃) = ?t2

  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · g₃)
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · π₂) h₂ g₃)
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ g₃))
• (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃) = ?t2

 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)

B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · g₃)
• (lassociator (π₂ · h₁) h₂ g₃
   • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃)) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · g₃)
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · g₃)
            • (lassociator (π₂ · h₁) h₂ g₃
               • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃)))))) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₁) f
• (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
      • (pb_cell f g₁
         • ((π₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₁) f
• (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
      • (pb_cell f g₁
         • ((π₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃)))) =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · g₃)
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · g₃)
            • (lassociator (π₂ · h₁) h₂ g₃
               • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃))))))

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell

     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₁) f
• (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
      • (pb_cell f g₁
         • ((π₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃)))) =
?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
?b =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · g₃)
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · g₃)
            • (lassociator (π₂ · h₁) h₂ g₃
               • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₁) f
• (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f)
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
      • (pb_cell f g₁
         • ((π₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃)))) =
?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₁) f
    • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ▹ f))
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
 • (π₂ ◃ γ)) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃ = ?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(((((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f))
    • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f)
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
 • (π₂ ◃ γ)) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃ = ?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f))
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
      • (pb_cell f g₁
         • ((π₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃)))) =
?b

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f))
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
      • (pb_cell f g₁
         • ((π₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃)))) =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β ▹ f))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · g₃)
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · g₃)
            • (lassociator (π₂ · h₁) h₂ g₃
               • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
   • (pb_cell f g₁
      • ((π₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃))) =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · g₃)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · g₃)
         • (lassociator (π₂ · h₁) h₂ g₃
            • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃)))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
   • (pb_cell f g₁
      • ((π₂ ◃ (α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃)))
         • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃))) =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · g₃)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · g₃)
         • (lassociator (π₂ · h₁) h₂ g₃
            • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃)))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
   • (pb_cell f g₁
      • (((π₂ ◃ α)
          • ((π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ β))
             • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃)))
         • lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃))) =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · g₃)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · g₃)
         • (lassociator (π₂ · h₁) h₂ g₃
            • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃)))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(((((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
     • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
   • (π₂ ◃ α)) • (π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ β)))
 • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• lassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃ =
(((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂) • (f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β)))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · g₃))
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · g₃))
 • lassociator (π₂ · h₁) h₂ g₃)
• (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
 • (π₂ ◃ α)) • (π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ β)) =
(((((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂) • (f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β)))
     • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · g₃))
    • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · g₃))
   • lassociator (π₂ · h₁) h₂ g₃)
  • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃))
 • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃)
• (π₂ ◃ rassociator h₁ h₂ g₃)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
   • (pb_cell f g₁ • ((π₂ ◃ α) • (π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ β))))) =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · g₃)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · g₃)
         • (lassociator (π₂ · h₁) h₂ g₃
            • ((rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃)
               • (rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃
                  • (π₂ ◃ rassociator h₁ h₂ g₃)))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · g₃)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · g₃)
         • (lassociator (π₂ · h₁) h₂ g₃
            • ((rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃)
               • (rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃
                  • (π₂ ◃ rassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))))))) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
   • (pb_cell f g₁ • ((π₂ ◃ α) • (π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ β)))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · g₃)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · g₃)
         • (lassociator (π₂ · h₁) h₂ g₃
            • ((rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃)
               • (rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃
                  • (π₂ ◃ rassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))))))) =
?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
?b =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
   • (pb_cell f g₁ • ((π₂ ◃ α) • (π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ β)))))

• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ g₃)
 • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) g₃)
• (π₂ ◃ rassociator h₁ h₂ g₃) = ?t20

          
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
rassociator (π₂ · h₁) h₂ g₃
• rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · g₃) = ?t20

          apply idpath.

  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))

• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator (π₂ · h₁) h₂ g₃

  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)

    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)

(lassociator (π₂ · h₁) h₂ g₃
 • rassociator (π₂ · h₁) h₂ g₃)
• rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · g₃) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
id₂ (π₂ · h₁ · (h₂ · g₃))
• rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · g₃) = ?t2

        apply id2_left.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · g₃)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · g₃)
         • rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · g₃)))) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
   • (pb_cell f g₁ • ((π₂ ◃ α) • (π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ β)))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · g₃)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · g₃)
         • rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · g₃)))) = ?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
?b =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
   • (pb_cell f g₁ • ((π₂ ◃ α) • (π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ β)))))

• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ β))
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · g₃)

• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · g₃)

     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
• ((f /≃₁ α · π₂ ◃ β)
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · g₃)
      • rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · g₃))) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
   • ((f /≃₁ α · π₂ ◃ β)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · g₃)
         • rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · g₃)))) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
   • (pb_cell f g₁ • ((π₂ ◃ α) • (π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ β)))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
   • ((f /≃₁ α · π₂ ◃ β)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · g₃)
         • rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · g₃)))) = ?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
?b =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
   • (pb_cell f g₁ • ((π₂ ◃ α) • (π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ β)))))

• rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · g₃) = ?t2

 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)

(pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ g₂)
• ((π₂ · h₁ ◃ β) • rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · g₃)) = 
?t2

a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧

β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)

  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁

    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)

 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ g₂)
• (rassociator π₂ h₁ g₂ • (π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ β))) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ g₂)
      • (rassociator π₂ h₁ g₂ • (π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ β))))) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
   • (pb_cell f g₁ • ((π₂ ◃ α) • (π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ β)))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ g₂)) • rassociator π₂ h₁ g₂)
• (π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ β)) =
(((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
 • (π₂ ◃ α)) • (π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ β))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂)
 • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ g₂)) • rassociator π₂ h₁ g₂ =
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
• (π₂ ◃ α)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ g₂)
      • rassociator π₂ h₁ g₂)) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
   • (pb_cell f g₁ • (π₂ ◃ α)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((((((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)) • pb_cell f g₁)
    • (π₂ ◃ α)) • lassociator π₂ h₁ g₂)
  • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α) ^-1 ▹ g₂))
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ g₂)
      • rassociator π₂ h₁ g₂)) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
   • (pb_cell f g₁ • (π₂ ◃ α)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
   • (pb_cell f g₁
      • ((π₂ ◃ α)
         • (lassociator π₂ h₁ g₂
            • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α) ^-1 ▹ g₂)
               • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
                  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
                     • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ g₂)
                        • rassociator π₂ h₁ g₂)))))))) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α ▹ f)
   • (pb_cell f g₁ • (π₂ ◃ α)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(π₂ ◃ α)
• (lassociator π₂ h₁ g₂
   • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α) ^-1 ▹ g₂)
      • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
         • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
            • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ g₂)
               • rassociator π₂ h₁ g₂))))) = π₂ ◃ α

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(π₂ ◃ α)
• (lassociator π₂ h₁ g₂
   • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α) ^-1 ▹ g₂)
      • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
         • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
            • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ g₂)
               • rassociator π₂ h₁ g₂))))) =
(π₂ ◃ α) • id₂ (π₂ · (h₁ · g₂))

a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧

h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧

β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)

 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)

    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)

• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator π₂ h₁ g₂
• (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α) ^-1 ▹ g₂)
   • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ g₂)
            • rassociator π₂ h₁ g₂)))) =
id₂ (π₂ · (h₁ · g₂))

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧

h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧

β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)

  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)

k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator π₂ h₁ g₂
• (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α) ^-1 ▹ g₂)
   • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ g₂)
            • rassociator π₂ h₁ g₂)))) = ?b

a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧

β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
?b = id₂ (π₂ · (h₁ · g₂))

• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ g₂)
      • rassociator π₂ h₁ g₂)) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂)
 • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ g₂)) • rassociator π₂ h₁ g₂ =
?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(id₂ (f /≃₁ α · π₂ · g₂) • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ g₂))
• rassociator π₂ h₁ g₂ = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ g₂) • rassociator π₂ h₁ g₂ =
?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator π₂ h₁ g₂
• (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α) ^-1 ▹ g₂)
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ g₂)
      • rassociator π₂ h₁ g₂)) = id₂ (π₂ · (h₁ · g₂))

      
B: bicat_with_pb

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator π₂ h₁ g₂
• (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α) ^-1 ▹ g₂)
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ g₂)
      • rassociator π₂ h₁ g₂)) = ?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
?b = id₂ (π₂ · (h₁ · g₂))

a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁

   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)

((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α) ^-1 ▹ g₂)
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ g₂) • rassociator π₂ h₁ g₂) =
?t2

h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧

 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)

(((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α) ^-1 ▹ g₂)
 • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ g₂)) • rassociator π₂ h₁ g₂ =

B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α) ^-1 • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α)
 ▹ g₂) • rassociator π₂ h₁ g₂ = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
(id₂ (π₂ · h₁) ▹ g₂) • rassociator π₂ h₁ g₂ = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
id₂ (π₂ · h₁ · g₂) • rassociator π₂ h₁ g₂ = ?t2

        apply id2_left.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
lassociator π₂ h₁ g₂ • rassociator π₂ h₁ g₂ =
id₂ (π₂ · (h₁ · g₂))

      apply lassociator_rassociator.
    Qed.

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ==> f /≃₁ γ

     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)

  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)

• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ==> f /≃₁ γ

g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)

  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)

    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
cell_to_pb_obj_homot ?α ?β

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
 exact k₁.

 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)

f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
 exact k₂.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
cell_to_pb_obj_homot k₁ k₂
 exact pb_1cell_on_comp_homot.
    Defined.

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
pb_1cell_on_comp ▹ π₁ = k₁

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
pb_1cell_on_comp ▹ π₁ = k₁

      apply cell_to_pb_obj_pr1.
    Qed.

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
pb_1cell_on_comp ▹ π₂ = k₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)): invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · h₂ · g₃)
k₁:= ((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₁ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₁
k₂:= ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1: f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · π₂ ==> f /≃₁ γ · π₂
pb_1cell_on_comp ▹ π₂ = k₂

      apply cell_to_pb_obj_pr2.
    Qed.
  End PBOnComp.

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
f /≃₂ p = id₂ (f /≃₁ α)

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
f /≃₂ p = id₂ (f /≃₁ α)

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
cell_to_pb_obj_homot (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₁) (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂)
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
f /≃₂ p ▹ π₁ = id₂ (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂ = id₂ (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
cell_to_pb_obj_homot (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₁) (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂)
 
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
(((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂)
 • ((f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂ =
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f • ((f /≃₂ p ▹ π₁) ▹ f))
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f)
• (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
(((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂)
 • ((f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂ =
(((f /≃₂ p ▹ π₁ · f) • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f)
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f)
• (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
   • (((f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂)
      • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂)) =
(f /≃₂ p ▹ π₁ · f)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
   • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
(f /≃₂ p ▹ π₁ · f)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
   • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂))) =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
   • (((f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂)
      • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
(f /≃₂ p ▹ π₁ · f)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
   • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂))) = ?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
?b =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
   • (((f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂)
      • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
(f /≃₂ p ▹ π₁ · f)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
   • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂))) = ?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
   • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f)
• (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
id₂ (f /≃₁ α · (π₁ · f)) • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂) =
?t2

        apply id2_left.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
(f /≃₂ p ▹ π₁ · f) • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂) =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
   • (((f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂)
      • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂) • (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂ · g₂) =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
   • (((f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂)
      • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂ · g₂ =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
• (((f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂) • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂ · g₂ =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂ • (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂ · g₂))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂ · g₂ =
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂) • (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂ · g₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂ · g₂ =
id₂ (f /≃₁ α · (π₂ · g₂)) • (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂ · g₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂ · g₂ = f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂ · g₂

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
f /≃₂ p ▹ π₁ = id₂ (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁
 
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) ^-1 =
id₂ (f /≃₁ α · π₁)

      apply vcomp_rinv.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂ = id₂ (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂
 
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
(pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α • id₂ (π₂ · h))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α) ^-1 = id₂ (f /≃₁ α · π₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: α • (id₂ h ▹ g₂) = α
pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α) ^-1 =
id₂ (f /≃₁ α · π₂)

      apply vcomp_rinv.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (γ ▹ g₂) = β
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) ^-1 • (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₁) =
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ^-1

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (γ ▹ g₂) = β
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) ^-1 • (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₁) =
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ^-1

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (γ ▹ g₂) = β
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) ^-1 • (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₁) =
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ^-1

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (γ ▹ g₂) = β
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) ^-1
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ^-1) =
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ^-1

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (γ ▹ g₂) = β
((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) ^-1 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ^-1 =
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ^-1

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (γ ▹ g₂) = β
id₂ π₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ^-1 =
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ^-1

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (γ ▹ g₂) = β
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ^-1 = (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ^-1

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
linvunitor π₁ • (pb_1cell_on_id f g ▹ π₁) =
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g))
^-1

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
linvunitor π₁ • (pb_1cell_on_id f g ▹ π₁) =
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g))
^-1

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
linvunitor π₁ • (pb_1cell_on_id f g ▹ π₁) =
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g))
^-1

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
linvunitor π₁
• (lunitor π₁
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g)) ^-1) =
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g))
^-1

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
(linvunitor π₁ • lunitor π₁)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g))
  ^-1 =
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g))
^-1

a, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
id₂ π₁
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g))
  ^-1 =
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g))

a, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ a, b₂ ⟧
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g))
^-1 =
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g))
^-1

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) ^-1
 • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ^-1)
    • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁))
• (pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ π₁) =
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
   (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
^-1

β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) ^-1
 • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ^-1)
    • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁))
• (pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ π₁) =
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
   (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)

^-1

    
B: bicat_with_pb

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
