g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) ^-1
 • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ^-1)
    • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁))
• (((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
     • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
    • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
     ^-1) =
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
   (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
^-1

    
B: bicat_with_pb

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧

h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) ^-1
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ^-1)
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
      • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
         • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)
            • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α

                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                             h₁ β)
                          (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                             h₁ h₂ g₃)))) ^-1))))) =
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
   (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
^-1

h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)

                             h₁ h₂ g₃)))) ^-1))))) =
?b

β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧

h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
(((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
   • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁)
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)

     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)

β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
((id₂ (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · π₁))
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)

β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f

  ^-1 = ?t2

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
(id₂ (f /≃₁ α · π₁) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
  ^-1 = ?t2

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
  ^-1 = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) ^-1
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
     ^-1) =
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
   (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
^-1

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) ^-1 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
  ^-1 =
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
   (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
^-1

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
id₂ π₁
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
  ^-1 =
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
   (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
^-1

    apply id2_left.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
f /≃₂ r = f /≃₂ p • f /≃₂ q

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
f /≃₂ r = f /≃₂ p • f /≃₂ q

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
cell_to_pb_obj_homot (f /≃₂ r ▹ π₁) (f /≃₂ r ▹ π₂)
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
f /≃₂ r ▹ π₁ = (f /≃₂ p • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
f /≃₂ r ▹ π₂ = (f /≃₂ p • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
cell_to_pb_obj_homot (f /≃₂ r ▹ π₁) (f /≃₂ r ▹ π₂)
 
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
(((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂)
 • ((f /≃₂ r ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₂ g₂ =
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f • ((f /≃₂ r ▹ π₁) ▹ f))
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f)
• (f /≃₁ γ ◃ pb_cell f g₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
(((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂)
 • ((f /≃₂ r ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₂ g₂ =
(((f /≃₂ r ▹ π₁ · f) • lassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f)
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f)
• (f /≃₁ γ ◃ pb_cell f g₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
   • (((f /≃₂ r ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂)
      • rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₂ g₂)) =
(f /≃₂ r ▹ π₁ · f)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
   • (rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁ γ ◃ pb_cell f g₂)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
   • (((f /≃₂ r ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂)
      • rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₂ g₂)) = ?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
?b =
(f /≃₂ r ▹ π₁ · f)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
   • (rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁ γ ◃ pb_cell f g₂)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
   • (((f /≃₂ r ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂)
      • rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₂ g₂)) = ?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂
• (((f /≃₂ r ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂) • rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₂ g₂) =
?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂ • ((f /≃₂ r ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₂ g₂ = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
((f /≃₂ r ▹ π₂ · g₂) • lassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₂ g₂)
• rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₂ g₂ = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
(f /≃₂ r ▹ π₂ · g₂)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₂ g₂
   • rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₂ g₂) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• ((f /≃₂ r ▹ π₂ · g₂)
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₂ g₂
      • rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₂ g₂)) =
(f /≃₂ r ▹ π₁ · f)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
   • (rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁ γ ◃ pb_cell f g₂)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• ((f /≃₂ r ▹ π₂ · g₂) • id₂ (f /≃₁ γ · (π₂ · g₂))) =
(f /≃₂ r ▹ π₁ · f)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
   • (rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁ γ ◃ pb_cell f g₂)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂) • (f /≃₂ r ▹ π₂ · g₂) =
(f /≃₂ r ▹ π₁ · f)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
   • (rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁ γ ◃ pb_cell f g₂)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
(f /≃₂ r ▹ π₁ · f) • (f /≃₁ γ ◃ pb_cell f g₂) =
(f /≃₂ r ▹ π₁ · f)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
   • (rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁ γ ◃ pb_cell f g₂)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
f /≃₁ γ ◃ pb_cell f g₂ =
lassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
   • (f /≃₁ γ ◃ pb_cell f g₂))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
f /≃₁ γ ◃ pb_cell f g₂ =
(lassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ γ) π₁ f)
• (f /≃₁ γ ◃ pb_cell f g₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
f /≃₁ γ ◃ pb_cell f g₂ =
id₂ (f /≃₁ γ · (π₁ · f)) • (f /≃₁ γ ◃ pb_cell f g₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
f /≃₁ γ ◃ pb_cell f g₂ = f /≃₁ γ ◃ pb_cell f g₂

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
f /≃₂ r ▹ π₁ = (f /≃₂ p • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁
 
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
f /≃₂ r ▹ π₁ = (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₁) • (f /≃₂ q ▹ π₁)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1 =
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ^-1)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1 =
pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ^-1
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1 =
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ^-1
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1 =
((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) ^-1 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧

α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1 =
id₂ π₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧

δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1 = (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ) ^-1

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧

β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)

δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β

q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
f /≃₂ r ▹ π₂ = (f /≃₂ p • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂
 
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
f /≃₂ r ▹ π₂ = (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂) • (f /≃₂ q ▹ π₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
(pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α • (π₂ ◃ (δ₁ • δ₂)))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1 =
((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α • (π₂ ◃ δ₁))
 • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1)
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β • (π₂ ◃ δ₂))
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
(pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α • ((π₂ ◃ δ₁) • (π₂ ◃ δ₂)))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1 =
((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α • (π₂ ◃ δ₁))
 • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1)
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β • (π₂ ◃ δ₂))
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α
• ((π₂ ◃ δ₁) • ((π₂ ◃ δ₂) • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1)) =
pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α
• ((π₂ ◃ δ₁)
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β
         • ((π₂ ◃ δ₂) • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
(π₂ ◃ δ₂) • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1 =
(pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β
   • ((π₂ ◃ δ₂) • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
(π₂ ◃ δ₂) • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1 =
(((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ^-1 • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
 • (π₂ ◃ δ₂)) • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
(π₂ ◃ δ₂) • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1 =
(id₂ (π₂ · h₂) • (π₂ ◃ δ₂))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
γ: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₃ · g₂)
δ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α • (δ₁ ▹ g₂) = β
δ₂: h₂ ==> h₃
q: β • (δ₂ ▹ g₂) = γ
r: α • ((δ₁ • δ₂) ▹ g₂) = γ
(π₂ ◃ δ₂) • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1 =
(π₂ ◃ δ₂) • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ) ^-1

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lunitor (f /≃₁ α) =
((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α)
 • pb_1cell_on_comp f (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
     α) • f /≃₂ p

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lunitor (f /≃₁ α) =
((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α)
 • pb_1cell_on_comp f (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
     α) • f /≃₂ p

a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B

  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
cell_to_pb_obj_homot (lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁)
  (lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂)

a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B

     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁ =
(((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α)
  • pb_1cell_on_comp f
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) α) • f /≃₂ p)
▹ π₁

a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧

α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂ =
(((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α)
  • pb_1cell_on_comp f
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) α) • f /≃₂ p)
▹ π₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
cell_to_pb_obj_homot (lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁)
  (lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂)
 
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(((id₁ (f /≃ g₁) · (f /≃₁ α) ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
  • lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁) · (f /≃₁ α)) π₂ g₂)
 • ((lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂ =
((lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁) · (f /≃₁ α)) π₁ f
  • ((lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁) ▹ f))
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f)
• (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(((id₁ (f /≃ g₁) · (f /≃₁ α) ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
  • lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁) · (f /≃₁ α)) π₂ g₂)
 • ((lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂ =
(((lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁ · f)
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f)
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f)
• (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(id₁ (f /≃ g₁) · (f /≃₁ α) ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• (lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁) · (f /≃₁ α)) π₂ g₂
   • (((lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂)
      • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂)) =
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁ · f)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
   • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁ · f)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
   • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂))) =
(id₁ (f /≃ g₁) · (f /≃₁ α) ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• (lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁) · (f /≃₁ α)) π₂ g₂
   • (((lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂)
      • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁ · f)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
   • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂))) = ?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
?b =
(id₁ (f /≃ g₁) · (f /≃₁ α) ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• (lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁) · (f /≃₁ α)) π₂ g₂
   • (((lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂)
      • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁ · f)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
   • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂))) = ?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
   • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f)
• (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
id₂ (f /≃₁ α · (π₁ · f)) • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂) =
?t2

        apply id2_left.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁ · f)
• (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂) =
(id₁ (f /≃ g₁) · (f /≃₁ α) ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• (lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁) · (f /≃₁ α)) π₂ g₂
   • (((lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂)
      • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(id₁ (f /≃ g₁) · (f /≃₁ α) ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• (lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂ · g₂) =
(id₁ (f /≃ g₁) · (f /≃₁ α) ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• (lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁) · (f /≃₁ α)) π₂ g₂
   • (((lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂)
      • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂ · g₂ =
lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁) · (f /≃₁ α)) π₂ g₂
• (((lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂)
   • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂ · g₂ =
lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁) · (f /≃₁ α)) π₂ g₂
• (rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁) · (f /≃₁ α)) π₂ g₂
   • (lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂ · g₂))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂ · g₂ =
(lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁) · (f /≃₁ α)) π₂ g₂
 • rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁) · (f /≃₁ α)) π₂ g₂)
• (lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂ · g₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂ · g₂ =
id₂ (id₁ (f /≃ g₁) · (f /≃₁ α) · (π₂ · g₂))
• (lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂ · g₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂ · g₂ =
lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂ · g₂

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁ =
(((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α)
  • pb_1cell_on_comp f
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) α) • f /≃₂ p)
▹ π₁
 
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁ =
(((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁)
 • (pb_1cell_on_comp f
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) α ▹ π₁))
• (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₁)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁ =
((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁)
• ((pb_1cell_on_comp f
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) α ▹ π₁)
   • (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₁))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁ =
((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁)
• ((((rassociator
        (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
        (f /≃₁ α) π₁
      • (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁
         ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α))
     • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁))
    • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁)
                  α)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁)
                  h g₂)))) ^-1)
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h
                 g₂))) • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) ^-1))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁ =
(((((((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁)
     • rassociator
         (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
         (f /≃₁ α) π₁)
    • (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α))
   • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁))
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h
                g₂)))) ^-1)
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) ^-1

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁ =
(((((rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₁
     • (pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α · π₁))
    • (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α))
   • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁))
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h
                g₂)))) ^-1)
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) ^-1

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α =
((((rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₁
    • (pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α · π₁))
   • (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁
      ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α))
  • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁))
 • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h
               g₂)))) ^-1)
• pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
          (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α =
rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₁
• ((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α · π₁)
   • ((f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        (id₁ a₁) α)
                     (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        (id₁ a₁) h g₂)))) ^-1
            • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ a₁) α)
                      (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ a₁) h g₂)))))))

g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧

     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)

• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α =
rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₁
• ((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α · π₁)
   • ((f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) • id₂ π₁)))

B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₁
• ((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α · π₁)
   • ((f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
      • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁))) =
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α

g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧

       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
      • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁))) = ?b

• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
?b = (lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₁
• ((id₁ (f /≃ g₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
   • ((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ π₁)
      • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁))) =
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₁
• ((id₁ (f /≃ g₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
   • ((lunitor π₁
       • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)) ^-1)
      • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁))) =
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₁
• ((id₁ (f /≃ g₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
   • (lunitor π₁
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)) ^-1
         • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)))) =
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₁
• ((id₁ (f /≃ g₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
   • (lunitor π₁ • id₂ π₁)) =
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₁
• ((id₁ (f /≃ g₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) • lunitor π₁) =
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧

p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₁
• (lunitor (f /≃₁ α · π₁) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) =
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₁
 • lunitor (f /≃₁ α · π₁)) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α =
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₁
 • (lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₁
    • (lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁))) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α =
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
((rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₁
  • lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₁)
 • (lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁)) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α =
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(id₂ (id₁ (f /≃ g₁) · (f /≃₁ α) · π₁)
 • (lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁)) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α =
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α

  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α =
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂ =
(((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α)
  • pb_1cell_on_comp f
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) α) • f /≃₂ p)
▹ π₂
 
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂ =
(((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂)
 • (pb_1cell_on_comp f
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) α ▹ π₂))
• (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧

p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂ =
((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂)
• ((pb_1cell_on_comp f
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) α ▹ π₂)
   • (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂ =
((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂)
• ((((((rassociator
          (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
          (f /≃₁ α) π₂
        • (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁
           ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α))
       • lassociator
           (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) π₂ h)
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) ▹ h))
     • rassociator π₂ (id₁ a₁) h)
    • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁)
                  α)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁)
                  h g₂)))) ^-1)
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁)
                  α)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁)
                  h g₂))) • (π₂ ◃ lunitor h))
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α) ^-1))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂ =
((((((((((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂)
        • rassociator
            (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
            (f /≃₁ α) π₂)
       • (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁
          ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α))
      • lassociator
          (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) π₂ h)
     • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) ▹ h))
    • rassociator π₂ (id₁ a₁) h)
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h
                 g₂)))) ^-1)
  • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h
               g₂)))) • (π₂ ◃ lunitor h))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α) ^-1

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂ =
((((((((rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₂
        • (pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α · π₂))
       • (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁
          ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α))
      • lassociator
          (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) π₂ h)
     • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) ▹ h))
    • rassociator π₂ (id₁ a₁) h)
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h
                 g₂)))) ^-1)
  • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h
               g₂)))) • (π₂ ◃ lunitor h))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α) ^-1

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧

p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
((lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂) • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α)
• (π₂ ◃ linvunitor h) =
((((((rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₂
      • (pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α · π₂))
     • (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁
        ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α))
    • lassociator
        (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) π₂ h)
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) ▹ h))
  • rassociator π₂ (id₁ a₁) h)
 • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h
               g₂)))) ^-1)
• pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
          (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α • (π₂ ◃ linvunitor h)) =
rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₂
• ((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α · π₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α)
      • (lassociator
           (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) π₂ h
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) ▹ h)
            • (rassociator π₂ (id₁ a₁) h
               • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                           g₁)
                        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                              (id₁ a₁) α)
                           (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                              (id₁ a₁) h g₂)))) ^-1
                  • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            g₁)
                         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                               (id₁ a₁) α)
                            (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                               (id₁ a₁) h g₂)))))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α • (π₂ ◃ linvunitor h)) =
rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₂
• ((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α · π₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α)
      • (lassociator
           (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) π₂ h
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) ▹ h)
            • (rassociator π₂ (id₁ a₁) h
               • id₂ (π₂ · (id₁ a₁ · h)))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α • (π₂ ◃ linvunitor h)) =
rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₂
• ((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α · π₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α)
      • (lassociator
           (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) π₂ h
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) ▹ h)
            • rassociator π₂ (id₁ a₁) h))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₂
• ((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α · π₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α)
      • (lassociator
           (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) π₂ h
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) ▹ h)
            • rassociator π₂ (id₁ a₁) h)))) =
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α • (π₂ ◃ linvunitor h))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₂
• ((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α · π₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α)
      • (lassociator
           (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) π₂ h
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) ▹ h)
            • rassociator π₂ (id₁ a₁) h)))) = ?b

a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B

• ((f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁
    ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α)

B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
((((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ f /≃₁ α · π₂)
   • (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁
      ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α))
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
      π₂ h)
 • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
    ▹ h)) • rassociator π₂ (id₁ a₁) h = ?t2

a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧

p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
((((id₁ (f /≃ g₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α)
   • (pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ π₂ · h))
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
      π₂ h)
 • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
    ▹ h)) • rassociator π₂ (id₁ a₁) h = ?t2

g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧

p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α

• ((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ π₂ · h)
   • (lassociator

      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f

         • rassociator π₂ (id₁ a₁) h))) = ?t2

        apply idpath.

rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₂
• ((id₁ (f /≃ g₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α)
   • (lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) π₂ h
      • (((pb_1cell_on_id f g₁ ▹ π₂) ▹ h)
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) ▹ h)
            • rassociator π₂ (id₁ a₁) h)))) =
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α • (π₂ ◃ linvunitor h))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₂
• ((id₁ (f /≃ g₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α)
   • (lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) π₂ h
      • ((((lunitor π₂ • rinvunitor π₂)
           • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)) ^-1)
          ▹ h)
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁) ▹ h)
            • rassociator π₂ (id₁ a₁) h)))) =
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α • (π₂ ◃ linvunitor h))

a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B

p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁))
 ^-1 ▹ h)
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
    ▹ h) • rassociator π₂ (id₁ a₁) h) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb

(((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁))
  ^-1 ▹ h)
 • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
    ▹ h)) • rassociator π₂ (id₁ a₁) h = ?t2

(((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁))
  ^-1
  • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁))
 ▹ h) • rassociator π₂ (id₁ a₁) h = ?t2

(id₂ (π₂ · id₁ a₁) ▹ h) • rassociator π₂ (id₁ a₁) h =

id₂ (π₂ · id₁ a₁ · h) • rassociator π₂ (id₁ a₁) h =
?t2

        apply id2_left.

rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₂
• ((id₁ (f /≃ g₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α)
   • (lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) π₂ h
      • ((lunitor π₂ ▹ h)
         • ((rinvunitor π₂ ▹ h)
            • rassociator π₂ (id₁ a₁) h)))) =

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
((((rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₂
    • (id₁ (f /≃ g₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α))
   • lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) π₂ h)
  • (lunitor π₂ ▹ h)) • (rinvunitor π₂ ▹ h))
• rassociator π₂ (id₁ a₁) h =
((lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂) • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α)
• (π₂ ◃ linvunitor h)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧

p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)

     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(((((rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₂
     • (id₁ (f /≃ g₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α))
    • lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) π₂ h)
   • (lunitor π₂ ▹ h)) • (rinvunitor π₂ ▹ h))
 • rassociator π₂ (id₁ a₁) h) • (π₂ ◃ lunitor h) =
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂) • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α

rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₂
• ((id₁ (f /≃ g₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α)
   • (lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) π₂ h
      • (lunitor π₂ ▹ h))) =
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂) • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₂
• ((id₁ (f /≃ g₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α)
   • lunitor (π₂ · h)) =
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂) • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₂
• (lunitor (f /≃₁ α · π₂) • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α) =
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂) • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₂
 • lunitor (f /≃₁ α · π₂)) • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α =
(lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂) • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₂
• lunitor (f /≃₁ α · π₂) = lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₂
• (lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₂
   • (lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂)) =
lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(rassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₂
 • lassociator (id₁ (f /≃ g₁)) (f /≃₁ α) π₂)
• (lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂) = lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₁)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) α)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ a₁) h g₂))
• (lunitor h ▹ g₂) = α
id₂ (id₁ (f /≃ g₁) · (f /≃₁ α) · π₂)
• (lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂) = lunitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂

      apply id2_left.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
runitor (f /≃₁ α) =
((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_id f g₂)
 • pb_1cell_on_comp f α
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂)) • f /≃₂ p

p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
runitor (f /≃₁ α) =
((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_id f g₂)
 • pb_1cell_on_comp f α
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂)) • f /≃₂ p

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧

     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
cell_to_pb_obj_homot (runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁)
  (runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂)

▹ π₁

a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B

g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))

B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(((f /≃₁ α · id₁ (f /≃ g₂) ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₂ g₂)
 • ((runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂ =
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α · id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₁ f
  • ((runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁) ▹ f))
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f)
• (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(f /≃₁ α · id₁ (f /≃ g₂) ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₂ g₂
   • (((runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂)
      • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂)) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α · id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₁ f
• (((runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb

g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧

p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α

     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lassociator (f /≃₁ α · id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₁ f
• (((runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂))) =
(f /≃₁ α · id₁ (f /≃ g₂) ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₂ g₂
   • (((runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂)
      • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂))

a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B

g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧

• (((runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂))) = ?b

        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
?b =
(f /≃₁ α · id₁ (f /≃ g₂) ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₂ g₂
   • (((runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂)
      • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧

     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lassociator (f /≃₁ α · id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₁ f
• (((runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂))) = ?b

((runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁) ▹ f)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₁ f
   • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)) = ?t2

• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
rassociator (f /≃₁ α · id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₁ f
• ((runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁ · f)
   • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂)) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lassociator (f /≃₁ α · id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₁ f
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α · id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₁ f
   • ((runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁ · f)
      • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_cell f g₂))) =
(f /≃₁ α · id₁ (f /≃ g₂) ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₂ g₂
   • (((runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂)
      • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂))

g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lassociator (f /≃₁ α · id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₁ f
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α · id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₁ f
   • ((f /≃₁ α · id₁ (f /≃ g₂) ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
      • (runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂ · g₂))) =
(f /≃₁ α · id₁ (f /≃ g₂) ◃ pb_cell f g₂)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₂ g₂
   • (((runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₂)
      • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ g₂))

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁ =
(((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_id f g₂)
  • pb_1cell_on_comp f α
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂)) • f /≃₂ p)
▹ π₁
 
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁ =
(((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_id f g₂) ▹ π₁)
 • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂) ▹ π₁))
• (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₁)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁ =
(((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_id f g₂) ▹ π₁)
 • (((rassociator (f /≃₁ α)
        (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂) π₁
      • (f /≃₁ α
         ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂)))
     • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
    • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
                  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h
                  (id₁ a₂) g₂)))) ^-1))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂)))
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) ^-1)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧

p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α

        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁ =
((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_id f g₂) ▹ π₁)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α)
     (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂) π₁
   • ((f /≃₁ α
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
                        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                           g₂))
                     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h
                        (id₁ a₂) g₂)))) ^-1
            • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             g₂))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell h
                          (id₁ a₂) g₂)))
               • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) ^-1)))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_id f g₂) ▹ π₁)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α)
     (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂) π₁
   • ((f /≃₁ α
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
                        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                           g₂))
                     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h
                        (id₁ a₂) g₂)))) ^-1
            • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             g₂))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell h
                          (id₁ a₂) g₂)))
               • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) ^-1))))) =
runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁

     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α

• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α)
     (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂) π₁
   • ((f /≃₁ α
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α

                     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h

                           g₂))

                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             g₂))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell h
                          (id₁ a₂) g₂)))
               • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) ^-1))))) = 
?b

     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))

?b = runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁
