            • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             g₂))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell h
                          (id₁ a₂) g₂)))
               • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) ^-1))))) = 
?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧

     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
   (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))))
^-1
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂)))
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) ^-1) = ?t2

     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))

    (comp_of_invertible_2cell α

 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell

id₂ π₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) ^-1 = ?t2

B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_id f g₂) ▹ π₁)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α)
     (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂) π₁
   • ((f /≃₁ α
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α
         • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) ^-1))) =
runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₁

a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B

(((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_id f g₂)
  • pb_1cell_on_comp f α
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂)) • f /≃₂ p)
▹ π₂

            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂)
               g₂))) • (π₂ ◃ runitor h))
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α) ^-1)

           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (id₁ a₂)
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ id₁ a₂)
            • (rassociator π₂ h (id₁ a₂)
               • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                              h
                              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                 g₂))
                           (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                              h (id₁ a₂) g₂)))) ^-1
                  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                h
                                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                   g₂))
                             (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                                h (id₁ a₂) g₂)))
                     • ((π₂ ◃ runitor h)
                        • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α) ^-1)))))))) =
runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_id f g₂) ▹ π₂)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α)
     (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂) π₂
   • ((f /≃₁ α
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (id₁ a₂)
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ id₁ a₂)
            • (rassociator π₂ h (id₁ a₂)
               • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                              h
                              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                 g₂))
                           (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                              h (id₁ a₂) g₂)))) ^-1
                  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                h
                                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                   g₂))
                             (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                                h (id₁ a₂) g₂)))
                     • ((π₂ ◃ runitor h)
                        • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α) ^-1)))))))) =
?b

g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧

     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))

h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ id₁ a₂)
• (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α) ^-1 ▹ id₁ a₂)
   • runitor (f /≃₁ α · π₂)) = ?t2

g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧

α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ id₁ a₂)
 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α) ^-1 ▹ id₁ a₂))
• runitor (f /≃₁ α · π₂) = ?t2

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧

p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α) ^-1)
 ▹ id₁ a₂) • runitor (f /≃₁ α · π₂) = ?t2

a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B

p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(id₂ (f /≃₁ α · π₂) ▹ id₁ a₂) • runitor (f /≃₁ α · π₂) =
?t2

a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B

p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))

id₂ (f /≃₁ α · π₂ · id₁ a₂) • runitor (f /≃₁ α · π₂) =
?t2

        apply id2_left.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_id f g₂) ▹ π₂)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α)
     (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂) π₂
   • ((f /≃₁ α
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (id₁ a₂)
         • runitor (f /≃₁ α · π₂)))) =
runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_id f g₂) ▹ π₂)
   • rassociator (f /≃₁ α)
       (f /≃₁ linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂) π₂)
  • (f /≃₁ α
     ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂)))
 • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (id₁ a₂))
• runitor (f /≃₁ α · π₂) = runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₂
   • (f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_1cell_on_id f g₂ ▹ π₂)))
  • (f /≃₁ α
     ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂)))
 • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (id₁ a₂))
• runitor (f /≃₁ α · π₂) = runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₂
   • (f /≃₁ α
      ◃ ((lunitor π₂ • rinvunitor π₂)
         • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂)) ^-1)))
  • (f /≃₁ α
     ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂)))
 • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (id₁ a₂))
• runitor (f /≃₁ α · π₂) = runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₂
• ((f /≃₁ α
    ◃ (lunitor π₂
       • (rinvunitor π₂
          • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂)) ^-1)))
   • ((f /≃₁ α
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (id₁ a₂)
         • runitor (f /≃₁ α · π₂)))) =
runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂

     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))

    ◃ (lunitor π₂

      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (id₁ a₂)
         • runitor (f /≃₁ α · π₂)))) = ?b

B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(f /≃₁ α
 ◃ (lunitor π₂
    • (rinvunitor π₂
       • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂)) ^-1
          • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂)))))
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (id₁ a₂)
   • runitor (f /≃₁ α · π₂)) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(f /≃₁ α
 ◃ (lunitor π₂ • (rinvunitor π₂ • id₂ (π₂ · id₁ a₂))))
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (id₁ a₂)
   • runitor (f /≃₁ α · π₂)) = ?t2

p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α

     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (lunitor π₂ • rinvunitor π₂))
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (id₁ a₂)
   • runitor (f /≃₁ α · π₂)) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₂
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (lunitor π₂ • rinvunitor π₂))
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (id₁ a₂)
      • runitor (f /≃₁ α · π₂))) =
runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₂
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (lunitor π₂ • rinvunitor π₂))
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (id₁ a₂)
      • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (id₁ a₂)
         • (f /≃₁ α ◃ runitor π₂)))) =
runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂

     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α

• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (lunitor π₂ • rinvunitor π₂))
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (id₁ a₂)
      • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (id₁ a₂)
         • (f /≃₁ α ◃ runitor π₂)))) = ?b

p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
?b = runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₂
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (lunitor π₂ • rinvunitor π₂))
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (id₁ a₂)
      • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (id₁ a₂)
         • (f /≃₁ α ◃ runitor π₂)))) = ?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (id₁ a₂)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (id₁ a₂)
   • (f /≃₁ α ◃ runitor π₂)) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (id₁ a₂)
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (id₁ a₂))
• (f /≃₁ α ◃ runitor π₂) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
id₂ (f /≃₁ α · (π₂ · id₁ a₂)) • (f /≃₁ α ◃ runitor π₂) =
?t2

        apply id2_left.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₂
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (lunitor π₂ • rinvunitor π₂))
   • (f /≃₁ α ◃ runitor π₂)) = runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₂
• (f /≃₁ α
   ◃ ((lunitor π₂ • rinvunitor π₂) • runitor π₂)) =
runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B

g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧

     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₂
• (f /≃₁ α
   ◃ (lunitor π₂ • (rinvunitor π₂ • runitor π₂))) =
runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₂
• (f /≃₁ α ◃ (lunitor π₂ • id₂ π₂)) =
runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (id₁ (f /≃ g₂)) π₂
• (f /≃₁ α ◃ lunitor π₂) = runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h · g₂)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell g₂))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h (id₁ a₂) g₂))
• (runitor h ▹ g₂) = α
runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂ = runitor (f /≃₁ α) ▹ π₂

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                 g₄))))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂) γ)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄))
((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
 • pb_1cell_on_comp f α
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄))))
• f /≃₂ p =
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ)
 • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ))
• pb_1cell_on_comp f
    (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
          (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))) γ

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                 g₄))))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂) γ)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄))
((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
 • pb_1cell_on_comp f α
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄))))
• f /≃₂ p =
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ)
 • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ))
• pb_1cell_on_comp f
    (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
          (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))) γ

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
 • pb_1cell_on_comp f α
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄))))
• f /≃₂ p =
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ)
 • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ))
• pb_1cell_on_comp f
    (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
          (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))) γ

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
cell_to_pb_obj_homot
  ((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
     • pb_1cell_on_comp f α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄))))
    • f /≃₂ p) ▹ π₁)
  ((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
     • pb_1cell_on_comp f α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄))))
    • f /≃₂ p) ▹ π₂)
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
  • pb_1cell_on_comp f α
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄))))
 • f /≃₂ p) ▹ π₁ =
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ)
  • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ))
 • pb_1cell_on_comp f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))) γ)
▹ π₁
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
  • pb_1cell_on_comp f α
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄))))
 • f /≃₂ p) ▹ π₂ =
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ)
  • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ))
 • pb_1cell_on_comp f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))) γ)
▹ π₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
cell_to_pb_obj_homot
  ((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
     • pb_1cell_on_comp f α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄))))
    • f /≃₂ p) ▹ π₁)
  ((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
     • pb_1cell_on_comp f α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄))))
    • f /≃₂ p) ▹ π₂)
 
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) ◃ pb_cell f g₄)
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ))) π₂
      g₄)
 • (((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
       • pb_1cell_on_comp f α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                    g₄)))) • f /≃₂ p) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₄))
• rassociator
    (f /≃₁
     comp_of_invertible_2cell
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂) γ)
          (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂) h₃
             g₄))) π₂ g₄ =
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ))) π₁ f
  • (((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
        • pb_1cell_on_comp f α
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                  (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                     g₄)))) • f /≃₂ p) ▹ π₁) ▹ f))
 • rassociator
     (f /≃₁
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂) γ)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂) h₃
              g₄))) π₁ f)
• (f /≃₁
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂) γ)
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄))
   ◃ pb_cell f g₄)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) ◃ pb_cell f g₄)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ))) π₂ g₄
   • (((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
         • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂
                       h₃ g₄))) • f /≃₂ p)) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₄)
      • rassociator
          (f /≃₁
           comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂
                      g₃)))
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                   (h₁ · h₂) γ)
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                   (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄))) π₂ g₄)) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ))) π₁ f
• (((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
      • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                    g₄))) • f /≃₂ p)) ▹ π₁) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator
        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂
                    g₃)))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 γ)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 h₃ g₄))) π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂
                    g₃)))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 γ)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 h₃ g₄)) ◃ pb_cell f g₄)))

(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) ◃ pb_cell f g₄)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ))) π₂ g₄
   • (((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
         • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α

                   (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄))) π₂ g₄)) = ?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
?b =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ))) π₁ f
• (((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
      • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                    g₄))) • f /≃₂ p)) ▹ π₁) ▹ f)

        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell

                    g₃)))

              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 γ)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 h₃ g₄))) π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell

                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂
                    g₃)))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 γ)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 h₃ g₄)) ◃ pb_cell f g₄)))

 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))

• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ))) π₂ g₄

B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B

• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)

• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ))) π₂ g₄
   • (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)

                     g₄))) • f /≃₂ p)) ▹ π₂ · g₄)) =

• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
id₂ (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) · (π₂ · g₄))
• ((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
     • pb_1cell_on_comp f α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄))))
    • f /≃₂ p) ▹ π₂ · g₄) = ?t2

        apply id2_left.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) ◃ pb_cell f g₄)
• ((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
     • pb_1cell_on_comp f α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄))))
    • f /≃₂ p) ▹ π₂ · g₄) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ))) π₁ f
• (((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
      • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                    g₄))) • f /≃₂ p)) ▹ π₁) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator
        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂
                    g₃)))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 γ)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 h₃ g₄))) π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂
                    g₃)))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 γ)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 h₃ g₄)) ◃ pb_cell f g₄)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧

h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧

β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)

 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ))) π₁ f
• (((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
      • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                    g₄))) • f /≃₂ p)) ▹ π₁) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator
        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂
                    g₃)))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 γ)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 h₃ g₄))) π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂
                    g₃)))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 γ)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 h₃ g₄)) ◃ pb_cell f g₄))) =
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) ◃ pb_cell f g₄)
• ((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
     • pb_1cell_on_comp f α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄))))
    • f /≃₂ p) ▹ π₂ · g₄)

 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))

lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ))) π₁ f
• (((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
      • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                    g₄))) • f /≃₂ p)) ▹ π₁) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator
        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)

                 γ)

                 h₃ g₄))) π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell

                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂
                    g₃)))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 γ)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 h₃ g₄)) ◃ pb_cell f g₄))) = ?b

 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))

• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
?b =
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) ◃ pb_cell f g₄)

β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)

 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))

• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ))) π₁ f
  • (((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
        • pb_1cell_on_comp f α

   ◃ pb_cell f g₄) = ?b

β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))

• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ))) π₁ f
 • (((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
       • pb_1cell_on_comp f α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell β

                    g₄)))) • f /≃₂ p) ▹ π₁) ▹ f))

    (f /≃₁
     comp_of_invertible_2cell

(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
  • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄)))
     • f /≃₂ p)) ▹ π₁ · f)
• (lassociator
     (f /≃₁
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂) γ)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂) h₃
              g₄))) π₁ f
   • rassociator
       (f /≃₁
        comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂) γ)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                h₃ g₄))) π₁ f) = ?y'

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
  • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄)))
     • f /≃₂ p)) ▹ π₁ · f)
• id₂
    (f /≃₁
     comp_of_invertible_2cell
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂) γ)
          (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂) h₃
             g₄)) · (π₁ · f)) = ?y'

        apply id2_right.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
  • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄)))
     • f /≃₂ p)) ▹ π₁ · f)
• (f /≃₁
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂) γ)
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄))
   ◃ pb_cell f g₄) =
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) ◃ pb_cell f g₄)
• ((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
     • pb_1cell_on_comp f α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄))))
    • f /≃₂ p) ▹ π₂ · g₄)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) ◃ pb_cell f g₄)
• (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
    • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄)))
       • f /≃₂ p)) ▹ π₂ · g₄) =
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) ◃ pb_cell f g₄)
• ((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
     • pb_1cell_on_comp f α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄))))
    • f /≃₂ p) ▹ π₂ · g₄)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) ◃ pb_cell f g₄)
• (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
    • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄)))
       • f /≃₂ p)) ▹ π₂ · g₄) =
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) ◃ pb_cell f g₄)
• (((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
    • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄)))
       • f /≃₂ p)) ▹ π₂ · g₄)

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
  • pb_1cell_on_comp f α
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄))))
 • f /≃₂ p) ▹ π₁ =
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ)
  • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ))
 • pb_1cell_on_comp f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))) γ)
▹ π₁
 
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ) ▹ π₁)
 • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    ▹ π₁)) • (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₁) =
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
 • ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁))
• (pb_1cell_on_comp f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))) γ
   ▹ π₁)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ) ▹ π₁)
 • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    ▹ π₁)) • (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₁) = ?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
?b =
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
 • ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁))
• (pb_1cell_on_comp f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))) γ
   ▹ π₁)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ) ▹ π₁)
 • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    ▹ π₁)) • (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₁) = ?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ) ▹ π₁)
 • (((rassociator (f /≃₁ α)
        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell β
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄)))
        π₁
      • (f /≃₁ α
         ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                      g₄))))) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
    • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
                     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                           h₂ γ)
                        (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                           h₂ h₃ g₄))))
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁
                  (h₂ · h₃) g₄)))) ^-1))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂
                       h₃ g₄))))
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
              g₄)))
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂
                    g₃)))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 γ)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 h₃ g₄)))) ^-1) = ?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ) ▹ π₁)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α)
     (f /≃₁
      comp_of_invertible_2cell β
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄)))
     π₁
   • ((f /≃₁ α
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                    g₄))))
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁
                        (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
                           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                 h₂ γ)
                              (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                                 h₂ h₃ g₄))))
                     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁
                        (h₂ · h₃) g₄)))) ^-1
            • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                          h₁
                          (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
                             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                                (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                   h₂ γ)
                                (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                                   h₂ h₃ g₄))))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄)))
               • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                h₁ β)
                             (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                                h₁ h₂ g₃)))
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                             (h₁ · h₂) γ)
                          (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                             (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)))) ^-1))))) =
?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ) ▹ π₁)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α)
     (f /≃₁
      comp_of_invertible_2cell β
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄)))
     π₁
   • ((f /≃₁ α
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                    g₄))))
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁
                        (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
                           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                 h₂ γ)
                              (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                                 h₂ h₃ g₄))))
                     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁
                        (h₂ · h₃) g₄)))) ^-1
            • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                          h₁
                          (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
                             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                                (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                   h₂ γ)
                                (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                                   h₂ h₃ g₄))))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄)))
               • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                h₁ β)
                             (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                                h₁ h₂ g₃)))
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                             (h₁ · h₂) γ)
                          (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                             (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)))) ^-1))))) =
?b0

B: bicat_with_pb

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
   (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                  (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                     g₄))))
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))))
^-1
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂
                       h₃ g₄))))
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
              g₄)))
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂
                    g₃)))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 γ)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 h₃ g₄)))) ^-1) = ?t2

          
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
    (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                      g₄))))
          (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
             g₄)))) ^-1
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂
                       h₃ g₄))))
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
              g₄))))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂) γ)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂) h₃
              g₄)))) ^-1 = ?t2

p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))

• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
id₂ π₁
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)

           (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂) h₃
              g₄)))) ^-1 = ?t2

          apply id2_left.

B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧

β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ) ▹ π₁)
   • rassociator (f /≃₁ α)
       (f /≃₁

               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄)))))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f

     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell α

        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
