p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(f /≃₁ α
 ◃ (rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
    • ((f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)
       • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β
          • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂
                         γ)
                      (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂
                         h₃ g₄)))) ^-1
             • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                          h₂ γ)
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          h₂ h₃ g₄))))))))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂
                    g₃)))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 γ)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 h₃ g₄)))) ^-1) = ?t2

          
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(f /≃₁ α
 ◃ (rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
    • ((f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)
       • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β • id₂ π₁))))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂
                    g₃)))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 γ)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 h₃ g₄)))) ^-1) = ?t2

          
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(f /≃₁ α
 ◃ (rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
    • ((f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)
       • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂
                    g₃)))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 γ)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 h₃ g₄)))) ^-1) = ?t2

          apply idpath.
        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₁
• ((f /≃₁ α
    ◃ (rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
       • ((f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)
          • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)))
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁
                       h₂ g₃)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (h₁ · h₂) γ)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)))) ^-1)) = ?b

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₁
• ((f /≃₁ α
    ◃ (rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
       • ((f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)
          • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)))
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁
                       h₂ g₃)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (h₁ · h₂) γ)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)))) ^-1)) =
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
 • ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁))
• (pb_1cell_on_comp f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))) γ
   ▹ π₁)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₁
• ((f /≃₁ α
    ◃ (rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
       • ((f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)
          • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)))
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁
                       h₂ g₃)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (h₁ · h₂) γ)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)))) ^-1)) =
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
 • ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁))
• (((rassociator
       (f /≃₁
        comp_of_invertible_2cell α
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
       (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
     • (f /≃₁
        comp_of_invertible_2cell α
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
        ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ))
    • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂
                    g₃)))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 γ)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂)
                 h₃ g₄)))) ^-1)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α
     ◃ ((rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
         • (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ))
        • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂) γ)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂) h₃
              g₄)))) ^-1 =
(((((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
    • ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁))
   • rassociator
       (f /≃₁
        comp_of_invertible_2cell α
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
       (f /≃₁ γ) π₁)
  • (f /≃₁
     comp_of_invertible_2cell α
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
          (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
     ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂) γ)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell (h₁ · h₂) h₃
              g₄)))) ^-1

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₁
 • (f /≃₁ α
    ◃ ((rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
        • (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ))
       • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α =
((((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
   • ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁))
  • rassociator
      (f /≃₁
       comp_of_invertible_2cell α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
      (f /≃₁ γ) π₁)
 • (f /≃₁
    comp_of_invertible_2cell α
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
    ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ))
• pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
    (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
          (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₁
• ((f /≃₁ α
    ◃ (rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
       • ((f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)
          • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)))
   • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α) =
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
• (((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
   • (rassociator
        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
        (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
      • ((f /≃₁
          comp_of_invertible_2cell α
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
          ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)
         • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂
                      g₃))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
• (((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
   • (rassociator
        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
        (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
      • ((f /≃₁
          comp_of_invertible_2cell α
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
          ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)
         • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂
                      g₃)))))) =
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₁
• ((f /≃₁ α
    ◃ (rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
       • ((f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)
          • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)))
   • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
• (((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
   • (rassociator
        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
        (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
      • ((f /≃₁
          comp_of_invertible_2cell α
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
          ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)
         • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂
                      g₃)))))) = ?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
?b =
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₁
• ((f /≃₁ α
    ◃ (rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
       • ((f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)
          • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)))
   • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
• (((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
   • (rassociator
        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
        (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
      • ((f /≃₁
          comp_of_invertible_2cell α
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
          ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)
         • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂
                      g₃)))))) = ?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
• (rassociator
     (f /≃₁
      comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
     (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
   • ((f /≃₁
       comp_of_invertible_2cell α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)
      • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))) =
?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
  • rassociator
      (f /≃₁
       comp_of_invertible_2cell α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
      (f /≃₁ γ) π₁)
 • (f /≃₁
    comp_of_invertible_2cell α
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
    ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ))
• pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
    (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
          (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))) =
?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
  • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ · π₁))
 • (f /≃₁
    comp_of_invertible_2cell α
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
    ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ))
• pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
    (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
          (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))) =
?t2

        apply idpath.

(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
• (((rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
     • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ · π₁))
    • (f /≃₁
       comp_of_invertible_2cell α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ))
   • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))) =
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₁
• ((f /≃₁ α
    ◃ (rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
       • ((f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)
          • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)))
   • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)

β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)

p: (α

• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
   • ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ · π₁)

• ((f /≃₁ α

       • ((f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)

   • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
   • ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ · π₁)
      • ((f /≃₁
          comp_of_invertible_2cell α
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
          ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)
         • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂
                      g₃)))))) = ?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ · π₁)
• ((f /≃₁
    comp_of_invertible_2cell α
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
    ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)
   • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))) =
?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ · π₁)
 • (f /≃₁
    comp_of_invertible_2cell α
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
    ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ))
• pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
    (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
          (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))) =
?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)
 • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ π₁))
• pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
    (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
          (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))) =
?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)
 • (((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
      • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
     • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
    • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
      ^-1))
• pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
    (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
          (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))) =
?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁
                        β)
                     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁
                        h₂ g₃)))) ^-1
            • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁
                         β)
                      (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁
                         h₂ g₃))))))) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α • id₂ π₁))) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)
      • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
   • ((f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)
      • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
         • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)
            • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)))) =
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₁
• ((f /≃₁ α
    ◃ (rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
       • ((f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)
          • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)))
   • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
    • rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁)
   • (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ))
  • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁)
 • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
• pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α =
(rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₁
 • (f /≃₁ α
    ◃ ((rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
        • (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ))
       • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
   • rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁)
  • (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ))
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁)
• (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) =
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₁
• (f /≃₁ α
   ◃ ((rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
       • (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ))
      • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
   • rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁)
  • (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ))
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁)
• (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) =
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₁
• (((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁)
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)))
   • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
   • rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁)
  • (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ))
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁)
• (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) =
((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₁
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁))
 • (f /≃₁ α ◃ (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)))
• (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
  • rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁)
 • (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ))
• rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁ =
(rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₁
 • (f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁))
• (f /≃₁ α ◃ (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
   • ((f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)
      • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₁)) =
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₁
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁)
   • (f /≃₁ α ◃ (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
   • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ · π₁)
      • (f /≃₁ α ◃ (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)))) =
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₁
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁)
   • (f /≃₁ α ◃ (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
  • rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁)
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ · π₁))
• (f /≃₁ α ◃ (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ)) =
(rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₁
 • (f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁))
• (f /≃₁ α ◃ (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f γ))

a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁)
• rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ · π₁) =
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₁
• (f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁)

a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B

h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧

α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
   • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ · π₁)) =
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₁
• (f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁)

a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
• rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ · π₁) =
(rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₁
   • (f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
• rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ · π₁) =
((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₁)
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₁)
• (f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
• rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ · π₁) =
rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₁
• rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ · π₁)

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ)
  • pb_1cell_on_comp f α
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄))))
 • f /≃₂ p) ▹ π₂ =
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ)
  • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ))
 • pb_1cell_on_comp f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))) γ)
▹ π₂
 
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ) ▹ π₂)
 • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    ▹ π₂)) • (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂) =
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₂)
 • ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₂))
• (pb_1cell_on_comp f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))) γ
   ▹ π₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ) ▹ π₂)
 • (((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α)
          (f /≃₁
           comp_of_invertible_2cell β
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄)))
          π₂
        • (f /≃₁ α
           ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))

• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =

• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)

           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
        (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
      • ((f /≃₁
          comp_of_invertible_2cell α
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
          ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
         • (lassociator
              (f /≃₁
               comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁
                       h₂ g₃))) π₂ h₃
            • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                           h₁ β)
                        (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                           h₁ h₂ g₃))) ▹ h₃)
               • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃)))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ) ▹ π₂)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α)
     (f /≃₁
      comp_of_invertible_2cell β
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄)))
     π₂
   • ((f /≃₁ α
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                    g₄))))
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
            • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
               • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                              h₁
                              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                                 β
                                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                                    ... ...)))
                           (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                              h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄)))) ^-1
                  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                h₁
                                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                                   β
                                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                                      ... ...)))
                             (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                                h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄)))
                     • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)))))))) =
?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
   (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                  (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                     g₄))))
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))))
^-1
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂
                       h₃ g₄))))
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
              g₄))) • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)) =
?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
    (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                      g₄))))
          (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
             g₄)))) ^-1
 • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂
                       h₃ g₄))))
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
              g₄)))) • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃) =
?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
id₂ (π₂ · (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃)))
• (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃) = ?t2

        apply id2_left.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ) ▹ π₂)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α)
     (f /≃₁
      comp_of_invertible_2cell β
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄)))
     π₂
   • ((f /≃₁ α
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                    g₄))))
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
            • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
               • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)))))) =
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₂)
• (((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₂)
   • (rassociator
        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
        (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
      • ((f /≃₁
          comp_of_invertible_2cell α
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
          ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
         • (lassociator
              (f /≃₁
               comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁
                       h₂ g₃))) π₂ h₃
            • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                           h₁ β)
                        (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                           h₁ h₂ g₃))) ▹ h₃)
               • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃)))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧

h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ) ▹ π₂)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α)
     (f /≃₁
      comp_of_invertible_2cell β
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄)))
     π₂
   • ((f /≃₁ α
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                    g₄))))
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
            • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
               • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)))))) = 
?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
?b =
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₂)
• (((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₂)
   • (rassociator
        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
        (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
      • ((f /≃₁
          comp_of_invertible_2cell α
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
          ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
         • (lassociator
              (f /≃₁
               comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁
                       h₂ g₃))) π₂ h₃
            • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                           h₁ β)
                        (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                           h₁ h₂ g₃))) ▹ h₃)
               • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃)))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ) ▹ π₂)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α)
     (f /≃₁
      comp_of_invertible_2cell β
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄)))
     π₂
   • ((f /≃₁ α
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                    g₄))))
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
            • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
               • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)))))) = 
?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ) ▹ π₂)
     • rassociator (f /≃₁ α)
         (f /≃₁
          comp_of_invertible_2cell β
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄)))
         π₂)
    • (f /≃₁ α
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                    g₄)))))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃))
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃))
• (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃) = ?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₂
     • (f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ ▹ π₂)))
    • (f /≃₁ α
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                    g₄)))))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃))
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃))
• (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃) = ?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₂
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_1cell_on_comp f β γ ▹ π₂))
   • ((f /≃₁ α
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                    g₄))))
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
            • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
               • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)))))) = 
?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₂
• ((f /≃₁ α
    ◃ (((((rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
           • (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ))
          • lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃)
         • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃))
        • rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)
       • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                  (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                     g₄)))) ^-1))
   • ((f /≃₁ α
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                    g₄))))
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
            • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
               • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)))))) = 
?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(f /≃₁ α
 ◃ (((((rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
        • (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ))
       • lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃)
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃))
     • rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)
    • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄))))
      ^-1))
• ((f /≃₁ α
    ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₄))))
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
         • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
            • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃))))) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((((f /≃₁ α
     ◃ (((((rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
            • (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ))
           • lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃)
          • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃))
         • rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)
        • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                      g₄)))) ^-1))
    • (f /≃₁ α
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                    g₄)))))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃))
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃))
• (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((((f /≃₁ α
    ◃ ((((((rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
            • (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ))
           • lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃)
          • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃))
         • rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)
        • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                      g₄)))) ^-1)
       • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ γ)
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃
                    g₄)))))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃))
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃))
• (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(f /≃₁ α
 ◃ (rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
    • ((f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
       • (lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃
          • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃)
             • (rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃
                • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                      (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
                         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                               h₂ γ)
                            (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                               h₂ h₃ g₄)))) ^-1
                   • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell β
                          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                h₂ γ)
                             (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                                h₂ h₃ g₄))))))))))
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
      • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
         • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)))) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(f /≃₁ α
 ◃ (rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
    • ((f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
       • (lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃
          • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃)
             • (rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃
                • id₂ (π₂ · (h₂ · h₃))))))))
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
      • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
         • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)))) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(f /≃₁ α
 ◃ (rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
    • ((f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
       • (lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃
          • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃)
             • rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)))))
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
      • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
         • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)))) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₂
• ((f /≃₁ α
    ◃ (rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
       • ((f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
          • (lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃
             • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃)
                • rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)))))
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
         • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
            • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃))))) =
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₂)
• (((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₂)
   • (rassociator
        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
        (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
      • ((f /≃₁
          comp_of_invertible_2cell α
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
          ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
         • (lassociator
              (f /≃₁
               comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁
                       h₂ g₃))) π₂ h₃
            • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                           h₁ β)
                        (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                           h₁ h₂ g₃))) ▹ h₃)
               • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃)))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₂)
• (((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₂)
   • (rassociator
        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
        (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
      • ((f /≃₁
          comp_of_invertible_2cell α
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
          ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
         • (lassociator
              (f /≃₁
               comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁
                       h₂ g₃))) π₂ h₃
            • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                           h₁ β)
                        (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                           h₁ h₂ g₃))) ▹ h₃)
               • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃))))) =
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₂
• ((f /≃₁ α
    ◃ (rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
       • ((f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
          • (lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃
             • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃)
                • rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)))))
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
         • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
            • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)))))

γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₂)
• (((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₂)
   • (rassociator
        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
        (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
      • ((f /≃₁
          comp_of_invertible_2cell α
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
          ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
         • (lassociator
              (f /≃₁
               comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁
                       h₂ g₃))) π₂ h₃
            • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                           h₁ β)
                        (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                           h₁ h₂ g₃))) ▹ h₃)
               • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃))))) = 
?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧

g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧

h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧

β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
?b =
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₂
• ((f /≃₁ α
    ◃ (rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
       • ((f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
          • (lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃
             • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃)
                • rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)))))
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
         • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
            • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)))))

   • (rassociator

           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
      ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ))
  • lassociator
      (f /≃₁
       comp_of_invertible_2cell α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
      π₂ h₃)
 • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
    ▹ h₃)) • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃ = ?t2

 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))

(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((((f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
   • (pb_1cell_on_comp f α β ▹ π₂ · h₃))
  • lassociator
      (f /≃₁
       comp_of_invertible_2cell α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
      π₂ h₃)
 • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
    ▹ h₃)) • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃ = ?t2

(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
