• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
  • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
     • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
        • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
           • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂
              • id₂ (π₂ · (h₁ · h₂))))))) ▹ h₃)
• rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃ = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
  • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
     • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
        • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
           • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)))) ▹ h₃)
• rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃ = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₂)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
   • ((f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ h₃
         • (((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
              • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
                 • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
                    • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
                       • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)))) ▹ h₃)
            • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃)))) =
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₂
• ((f /≃₁ α
    ◃ (rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
       • ((f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
          • (lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃
             • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃)
                • rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)))))
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
         • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
            • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₂)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
   • ((f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ h₃
         • (((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
              • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
                 • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
                    • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
                       • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)))) ▹ h₃)
            • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃)))) =
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₂
• (((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂)
    • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ))
       • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃)
          • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃))
             • (f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)))))
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
         • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
            • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₂)
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
   • ((f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ h₃
         • (((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
              • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
                 • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
                    • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
                       • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)))) ▹ h₃)
            • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃)))) =
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₂
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ))
      • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃)
         • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃))
            • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)
               • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
                  • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
                     • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
                        • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)))))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₂
   • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₂)
      • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ)
           π₂
         • ((f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
            • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ h₃
               • (((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
                    • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
                       • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
                          • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
                             • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂))))
                   ▹ h₃) • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃)))))) =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃))
      • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)
         • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
            • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
               • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
                  • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((((((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂)
      • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · (f /≃₁ γ)) π₂)
     • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ) ▹ π₂))
    • rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂)
   • (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ))
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ h₃)
 • (((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
        • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
       • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
     • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂) ▹ h₃))
• rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃ =
(((((((f /≃₁ α ◃ (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ))
      • (f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃))
     • (f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃)))
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃))
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃))
• (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧

β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ · π₂)
     • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂)
    • rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂)
   • (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ))
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ h₃)
 • (((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
        • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
       • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
     • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂) ▹ h₃))
• rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃ =
(((((((f /≃₁ α ◃ (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ))
      • (f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃))
     • (f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃)))
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃))
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃))
• (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧

β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ · π₂)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
   • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
      • ((f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
         • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ h₃
            • (((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
                 • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
                    • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
                       • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
                          • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂))))
                ▹ h₃) • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃))))) =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃))
      • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)
         • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
            • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
               • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
                  • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧

h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ · π₂)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
   • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
      • ((f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
         • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ h₃
            • (((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
                 • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
                    • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
                       • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
                          • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂))))
                ▹ h₃) • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃))))) =
?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
?b =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃))
      • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)
         • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
            • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
               • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
                  • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧

h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧

α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ · π₂)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
   • (rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
      • ((f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
         • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ h₃
            • (((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
                 • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
                    • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
                       • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
                          • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂))))
                ▹ h₃) • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃))))) =
?b

a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧

h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
   • ((f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ h₃
         • (((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
              • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
                 • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
                    • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
                       • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)))) ▹ h₃)
            • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃)))) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((((lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂
    • rassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) (f /≃₁ γ) π₂)
   • (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ))
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ h₃)
 • (((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
        • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
       • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
     • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂) ▹ h₃))
• rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃ = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧

β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)

 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))

(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((id₂ (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) · (f /≃₁ γ · π₂))
   • (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ))
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ h₃)
 • (((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
        • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
       • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
     • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂) ▹ h₃))
• rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃ = ?t2

(((f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ h₃)

        • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
       • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)

B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧

h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ h₃
   • (((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
        • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
           • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
              • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
                 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)))) ▹ h₃)
      • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃)) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ · π₂)
• ((f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ)
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ h₃
      • (((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
           • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
              • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
                 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
                    • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)))) ▹ h₃)
         • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃))) =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃))
      • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)
         • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
            • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
               • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
                  • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)))))))

   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃))

h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (f /≃₁ γ · π₂)
   • (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ))
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ h₃)
 • (((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
        • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
       • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
     • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂) ▹ h₃))
• rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃ = ?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((((f /≃₁ α ◃ (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (π₂ · h₃))
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ h₃)
 • (((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
        • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
       • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
     • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂) ▹ h₃))
• rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃ = ?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ))
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (π₂ · h₃)
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ h₃
      • (((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
           • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
              • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
                 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
                    • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)))) ▹ h₃)
         • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃))) = ?b

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ))
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (π₂ · h₃)
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ h₃
      • (((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
           • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
              • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
                 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
                    • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)))) ▹ h₃)
         • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃))) =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (f /≃₁ β ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f γ))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃))
      • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)
         • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
            • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
               • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
                  • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (π₂ · h₃)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ h₃
   • (((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
        • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
           • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
              • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
                 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)))) ▹ h₃)
      • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃)) =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃)
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃))
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
            • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
               • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (π₂ · h₃)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ h₃
   • (((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
        • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
           • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
              • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
                 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)))) ▹ h₃)
      • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃)) = ?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
?b =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃)
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃))
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
            • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
               • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃))))))

β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))

(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (π₂ · h₃)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ h₃
   • (((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
        • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
           • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
              • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
                 • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)))) ▹ h₃)
      • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃)) = ?b

 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =

• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) (π₂ · h₃)
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ h₃)
 • (((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
        • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
       • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)

     • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂) ▹ h₃))

B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃)
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₂) h₃)
  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ h₃))
 • (((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
        • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
       • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
     • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂) ▹ h₃))
• rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃ = ?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₂) h₃
   • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ h₃)
      • (((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
           • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
              • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
                 • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
                    • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)))) ▹ h₃)
         • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃))) = ?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ h₃)
• (((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
     • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
        • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
           • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
              • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)))) ▹ h₃)
   • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂ ▹ h₃)
 • (((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
        • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
       • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
     • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂) ▹ h₃))
• rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃ = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
  • ((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
        • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
       • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
      • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
     • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)) ▹ h₃)
• rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃ = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((((((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
      • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β) π₂)
     • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
    • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
  • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂) ▹ h₃)
• rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃ = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((((id₂ (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β · π₂))
     • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
    • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
  • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂) ▹ h₃)
• rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃ = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
    • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
  • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂) ▹ h₃)
• rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃ = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
  • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
     • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
        • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂))) ▹ h₃)
• rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃ = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₂) h₃
   • ((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
        • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
           • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
              • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂))) ▹ h₃)
      • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃)) =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ β) π₂ h₃)
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃))
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
            • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
               • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₂) h₃
• ((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
     • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
        • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
           • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂))) ▹ h₃)
   • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃) =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
         • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
            • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₂) h₃
• ((((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ h₃)
    • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ h₃)
       • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ h₃)
          • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ h₃))))
   • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃) =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
         • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
            • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
((((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β · π₂) h₃
    • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β) ▹ h₃))
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ h₃))
  • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ h₃))
 • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ h₃))
• rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃ =
(((((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃))
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃))
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃))
• (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃))
    • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (π₂ · h₂) h₃)
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ h₃))
  • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ h₃))
 • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ h₃))
• rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃ =
(((((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃))
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃))
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃))
• (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)

β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃))
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (π₂ · h₂) h₃
   • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ h₃)
      • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ h₃)
         • ((rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ h₃)
            • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃)))) =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β ▹ h₃))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
         • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
            • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧

g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (π₂ · h₂) h₃
• ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ h₃)
   • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ h₃)
      • ((rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ h₃)
         • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃))) =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
      • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
         • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (π₂ · h₂) h₃
   • ((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ h₃)
      • (((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ h₃)
         • ((rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ h₃)
            • rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃)))) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃)
   • (rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃)
      • (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)))

 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))

(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(((((f /≃₁ α ◃ lassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)
    • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) (π₂ · h₂) h₃)
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ ▹ h₃))
  • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂) ▹ h₃))
 • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ h₃))
• rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃ =
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ (h₂ · h₃)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂ · h₃))
 • rassociator π₂ h₁ (h₂ · h₃))
• (π₂ ◃ lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)

(rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ h₃)
• rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃ =
(rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ h₃)
• (rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃
   • (π₂
      ◃ (rassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ • lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ h₃)
• rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃ =
(rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ h₃)
• (rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃
   • (π₂ ◃ id₂ (h₁ · h₂ · h₃)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ h₃)
• rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃ =
(rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ h₃)
• (rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃
   • id₂ (π₂ · (h₁ · h₂ · h₃)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
g₄: B ⟦ a₄, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
γ: invertible_2cell g₃ (h₃ · g₄)
p: (α
 • ((h₁ ◃ (β • ((h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₂ h₃ g₄)))
    • lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) g₄))
• (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▹ g₄) =
(α • ((h₁ ◃ β) • lassociator h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ · h₂ ◃ γ) • lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ g₄)
(rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ h₃)
• rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃ =
(rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂ ▹ h₃)
• rassociator π₂ (h₁ · h₂) h₃

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ f /≃₂ p) • pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₂

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ f /≃₂ p) • pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
cell_to_pb_obj_homot
  ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁)
  ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂)
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁ =
((f /≃₁ α ◃ f /≃₂ p) • pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₂) ▹ π₁
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂ =
((f /≃₁ α ◃ f /≃₂ p) • pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₂) ▹ π₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
cell_to_pb_obj_homot
  ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁)
  ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂)
 
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(((f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β₁) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β₁)) π₂ g₃)
 • (((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₃))
• rassociator
    (f /≃₁
     comp_of_invertible_2cell α
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
          (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))) π₂
    g₃ =
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β₁)) π₁ f
  • (((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁) ▹ f))
 • rassociator
     (f /≃₁
      comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃)))
     π₁ f)
• (f /≃₁
   comp_of_invertible_2cell α
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
   ◃ pb_cell f g₃)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β₁) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β₁)) π₂ g₃
   • ((((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₃)
      • rassociator
          (f /≃₁
           comp_of_invertible_2cell α
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃)))
          π₂ g₃)) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β₁)) π₁ f
• ((((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator
        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃)))
        π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
         ◃ pb_cell f g₃)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β₁) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β₁)) π₂ g₃
   • ((((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₃)
      • rassociator
          (f /≃₁
           comp_of_invertible_2cell α
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃)))
          π₂ g₃)) = ?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
?b =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β₁)) π₁ f
• ((((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator
        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃)))
        π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
         ◃ pb_cell f g₃)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β₁) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β₁)) π₂ g₃
   • ((((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₃)
      • rassociator
          (f /≃₁
           comp_of_invertible_2cell α
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃)))
          π₂ g₃)) = ?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β₁)) π₂ g₃
• ((((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₃)
   • rassociator
       (f /≃₁
        comp_of_invertible_2cell α
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃)))
       π₂ g₃) = ?t2

g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧

g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))

comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β₁)) π₂ g₃
 • (((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₃))
• rassociator
    (f /≃₁
     comp_of_invertible_2cell α
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
          (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))) π₂
    g₃ = ?t2

     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂ · g₃)

           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃)))
     π₂ g₃)

    (f /≃₁

          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)

g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧

h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)

β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell

     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))

     · (π₂ · g₃)) = ?t2

        apply id2_right.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β₁) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂ · g₃) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β₁)) π₁ f
• ((((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator
        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃)))
        π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
         ◃ pb_cell f g₃)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β₁) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂ · g₃) =
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β₁)) π₁ f
  • (((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁) ▹ f))
 • rassociator
     (f /≃₁
      comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃)))
     π₁ f)
• (f /≃₁
   comp_of_invertible_2cell α
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
   ◃ pb_cell f g₃)

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β₁) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂ · g₃) =
((((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁ · f)
  • lassociator
      (f /≃₁
       comp_of_invertible_2cell α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃)))
      π₁ f)
 • rassociator
     (f /≃₁
      comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃)))
     π₁ f)
• (f /≃₁
   comp_of_invertible_2cell α
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
   ◃ pb_cell f g₃)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β₁) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂ · g₃) =
((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁ · f)
• (lassociator
     (f /≃₁
      comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃)))
     π₁ f
   • (rassociator
        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃)))
        π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
         ◃ pb_cell f g₃)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁ · f)
• (lassociator
     (f /≃₁
      comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃)))
     π₁ f
   • (rassociator
        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃)))
        π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
         ◃ pb_cell f g₃))) =
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β₁) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂ · g₃)

         ◃ pb_cell f g₃))) = ?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
?b =
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β₁) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂ · g₃)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁ · f)
• (lassociator
     (f /≃₁
      comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃)))
     π₁ f
   • (rassociator
        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃)))
        π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
         ◃ pb_cell f g₃))) = ?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
lassociator
  (f /≃₁
   comp_of_invertible_2cell α
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))) π₁ f
• (rassociator
     (f /≃₁
      comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃)))
     π₁ f
   • (f /≃₁
      comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
      ◃ pb_cell f g₃)) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(lassociator
   (f /≃₁
    comp_of_invertible_2cell α
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))) π₁
   f
 • rassociator
     (f /≃₁
      comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃)))
     π₁ f)
• (f /≃₁
   comp_of_invertible_2cell α
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
   ◃ pb_cell f g₃) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
id₂
  (f /≃₁
   comp_of_invertible_2cell α
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
   · (π₁ · f))
• (f /≃₁
   comp_of_invertible_2cell α
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
   ◃ pb_cell f g₃) = ?t2

        apply id2_left.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁ · f)
• (f /≃₁
   comp_of_invertible_2cell α
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
   ◃ pb_cell f g₃) =
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β₁) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂ · g₃)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β₁) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂ · g₃) =
(f /≃₁ α · (f /≃₁ β₁) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂ · g₃)

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁ =
((f /≃₁ α ◃ f /≃₂ p) • pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₂) ▹ π₁
 
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ ▹ π₁) • (f /≃₂ q ▹ π₁) =
((f /≃₁ α ◃ f /≃₂ p) ▹ π₁)
• (pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₂ ▹ π₁)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β₁) π₁
   • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁))
  • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
 • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
   ^-1)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
     ^-1) =
((f /≃₁ α ◃ f /≃₂ p) ▹ π₁)
• (((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β₂) π₁
     • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂))
    • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
     ^-1)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β₁) π₁
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁))
   • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
    ^-1)
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
  ^-1 =
(((((f /≃₁ α ◃ f /≃₂ p) ▹ π₁)
   • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β₂) π₁)
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₂))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
  ^-1

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β₁) π₁
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β₁))
   • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
    ^-1)
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell

     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
    ^-1)
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))

     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
  ^-1 =
((f /≃₁ α ◃ id₂ π₁) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
  ^-1

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
    ^-1)
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell

  ^-1 =
(id₂ (f /≃₁ α · π₁) • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α)

           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)

B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂ =
((f /≃₁ α ◃ f /≃₂ p) • pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₂) ▹ π₂
 
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₁ ▹ π₂) • (f /≃₂ q ▹ π₂) =
((f /≃₁ α ◃ f /≃₂ p) ▹ π₂)
• (pb_1cell_on_comp f α β₂ ▹ π₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β₁) π₂
     • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁))
    • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
  • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
 • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
   ^-1)
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃)))
    • (π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ γ)))
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
     ^-1) =
((f /≃₁ α ◃ f /≃₂ p) ▹ π₂)
• (((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β₂) π₂
       • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂))
      • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₃)
     • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₃))
    • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃)
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
     ^-1)
