         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
 • (π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ γ)))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
  ^-1 =
(((((((f /≃₁ α ◃ f /≃₂ p) ▹ π₂)
     • rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β₂) π₂)
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₃)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₃)) • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
  ^-1

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(((((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β₁) π₂
       • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁))
      • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂)
     • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
    • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
     ^-1)
  • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
 • (π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ γ)))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
  ^-1 =
(((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β₁) π₂
     • (f /≃₁ α ◃ (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂)))
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₃)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₃)) • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
  ^-1

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β₁) π₂
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁)
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
         • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂
            • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                           h₁ β₁)
                        (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                           h₁ h₂ g₃)))) ^-1
               • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                             h₁ β₁)
                          (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                             h₁ h₂ g₃)))
                  • ((π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ γ))
                     • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                          (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                                (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                   h₁ β₂)
                                (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                                   h₁ h₃ g₃)))) ^-1))))))) =
rassociator (f /≃₁ α) (f /≃₁ β₁) π₂
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂))
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂)
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₃
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₃)
            • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃
               • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                             h₁ β₂)
                          (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                             h₁ h₃ g₃)))) ^-1)))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
      • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁
                        β₁)
                     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁
                        h₂ g₃)))) ^-1
            • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                          h₁ β₁)
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          h₁ h₂ g₃)))
               • ((π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ γ))
                  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                h₁ β₂)
                             (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                                h₁ h₃ g₃)))) ^-1)))))) =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂)
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₃
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₃)
         • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃
            • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                          h₁ β₂)
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          h₁ h₃ g₃)))) ^-1))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
      • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁
                        β₁)
                     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁
                        h₂ g₃)))) ^-1
            • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                          h₁ β₁)
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          h₁ h₂ g₃)))
               • ((π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ γ))
                  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                h₁ β₂)
                             (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                                h₁ h₃ g₃)))) ^-1)))))) =
(f /≃₁ α
 ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁ • (π₂ ◃ γ))
    • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂)
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₃
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₃)
         • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃
            • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                          h₁ β₂)
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          h₁ h₃ g₃)))) ^-1))))

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧

α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)

p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
      • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell α

                     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁
                        β₁)
                     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁
                        h₂ g₃)))) ^-1
            • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                          h₁ β₁)
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          h₁ h₂ g₃)))
               • ((π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ γ))
                  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                h₁ β₂)
                             (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                                h₁ h₃ g₃)))) ^-1)))))) =
(((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁)
  • (f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ γ)))
 • (f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂)
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₃
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₃)
         • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃
            • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                          h₁ β₂)
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          h₁ h₃ g₃)))) ^-1))))

     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂

                        h₂ g₃)))) ^-1
            • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                          h₁ β₁)

                          h₁ h₂ g₃)))
               • ((π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ γ))

                             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                h₁ β₂)
                             (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                                h₁ h₃ g₃)))) ^-1)))))) =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₁)
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ γ))
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1)
      • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂)

                          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                h₁ β₂)
                             (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                                h₁ h₃ g₃)))) ^-1))))))

α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)

β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)

         • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell α

                    (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁

                             h₁ h₃ g₃)))) ^-1))))) =
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ γ))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂)
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₃

                             h₁ h₃ g₃)))) ^-1)))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ γ))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂)
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₃
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₃)
            • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃
               • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                             h₁ β₂)
                          (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                             h₁ h₃ g₃)))) ^-1))))) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
   • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
                  (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂
                     g₃)))) ^-1
         • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁
                       β₁)
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁
                       h₂ g₃)))
            • ((π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ γ))
               • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                             h₁ β₂)
                          (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                             h₁ h₃ g₃)))) ^-1)))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ γ))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂)
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₃
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₃)
            • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃
               • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                             h₁ β₂)
                          (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                             h₁ h₃ g₃)))) ^-1))))) =
?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
?b =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
   • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
                  (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂
                     g₃)))) ^-1
         • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁
                       β₁)
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁
                       h₂ g₃)))
            • ((π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ γ))
               • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                             h₁ β₂)
                          (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                             h₁ h₃ g₃)))) ^-1)))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ γ))
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1)
   • ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂)
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₃
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₃)
            • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃
               • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                             h₁ β₂)
                          (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                             h₁ h₃ g₃)))) ^-1))))) =
?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1)
• ((f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂)
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₃
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₃)
         • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃
            • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                          h₁ β₂)
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          h₁ h₃ g₃)))) ^-1)))) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(((((f /≃₁ α ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1)
    • (f /≃₁ α ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₃)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₃)) • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
  ^-1 = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
((((f /≃₁ α
    ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂) ^-1
       • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β₂))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₃)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₃)) • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
  ^-1 = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧

h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
((((f /≃₁ α ◃ id₂ (π₂ · h₃))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₃)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₃)) • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
  ^-1 = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(((id₂ (f /≃₁ α · (π₂ · h₃))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₃)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₃)) • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
  ^-1 = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₃
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₃)) • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
  ^-1 = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ γ))
• (((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₃
     • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₃))
    • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃)
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
     ^-1) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
   • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
                  (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂
                     g₃)))) ^-1
         • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁
                       β₁)
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁
                       h₂ g₃)))
            • ((π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ γ))
               • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                             h₁ β₂)
                          (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                             h₁ h₃ g₃)))) ^-1)))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
((((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ γ)) • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₃)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₃)) • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
  ^-1 =
(((((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
     • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
    • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
     ^-1)
  • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
 • (π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ γ)))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
  ^-1

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
(((f /≃₁ α ◃ (π₂ ◃ γ)) • lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₃)
 • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₃)) • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃ =
((((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
    • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
   • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
    ^-1)
 • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
• (π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ γ))

g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂ • (f /≃₁ α · π₂ ◃ γ))
 • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₃)) • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃ =
((((lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
    • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂))
   • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)

    ^-1)
 • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
• (π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ γ))

g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧

h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
• ((f /≃₁ α · π₂ ◃ γ)
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₃)
      • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃)) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α) π₂ h₂
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α ▹ h₂)
   • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₂
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
                  (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂
                     g₃)))) ^-1

              (comp_of_invertible_2cell α

                    (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁
                       β₁)
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁
                       h₂ g₃))) • (π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ γ))))))

p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂

β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ γ) =
((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
    (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
          (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
 ^-1
 • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))))
• (π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ γ))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ γ) = id₂ (π₂ · (h₁ · h₂)) • (π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ γ))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₂, h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
β₁: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₂ · g₃)
β₂: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₂ ==> h₃
p: β₁ • (γ ▹ g₃) = β₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₁)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₂ g₃))
• ((h₁ ◃ γ) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β₂)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ γ) = π₂ ◃ (h₁ ◃ γ)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q =
(f /≃₂ p ▹ f /≃₁ β) • pb_1cell_on_comp f α₂ β

γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))

comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q =
(f /≃₂ p ▹ f /≃₁ β) • pb_1cell_on_comp f α₂ β

cell_to_pb_obj_homot
  ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁)
  ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂)

B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
(((f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃)
 • (((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₃))
• rassociator
    (f /≃₁
     comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
          (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))) π₂
    g₃ =
((lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β)) π₁ f
  • (((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁) ▹ f))
 • rassociator
     (f /≃₁
      comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃)))
     π₁ f)
• (f /≃₁
   comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
   ◃ pb_cell f g₃)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃
   • ((((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₃)
      • rassociator
          (f /≃₁
           comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃)))
          π₂ g₃)) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β)) π₁ f
• ((((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator
        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃)))
        π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
         ◃ pb_cell f g₃)))

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃
   • ((((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₃)
      • rassociator
          (f /≃₁
           comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃)))
          π₂ g₃)) = ?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
?b =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β)) π₁ f
• ((((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator
        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃)))
        π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
         ◃ pb_cell f g₃)))

(f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃
   • ((((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₃)

B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃
• ((((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂) ▹ g₃)
   • rassociator
       (f /≃₁
        comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃)))
       π₂ g₃) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃
• (rassociator (f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃
   • ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂ · g₃)) =
?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃
 • rassociator (f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β)) π₂ g₃)
• ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂ · g₃) =
?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
id₂ (f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β) · (π₂ · g₃))
• ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂ · g₃) =
?t2

        apply id2_left.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂ · g₃) =
lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β)) π₁ f
• ((((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator
        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃)))
        π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
         ◃ pb_cell f g₃)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β)) π₁ f
• ((((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator
        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃)))
        π₁ f
      • (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
         ◃ pb_cell f g₃))) =
(f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂ · g₃)

g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧

h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β)) π₁ f
• ((((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator
        (f /≃₁
         comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂

        π₁ f

         comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂

              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
         ◃ pb_cell f g₃))) = ?b
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧

h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧

α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)

     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
?b =
(f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂ · g₃)

((lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β)) π₁ f
  • (((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁) ▹ f))
 • rassociator
     (f /≃₁

     π₁ f)

   comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))

B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))

comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
(lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β)) π₁ f
 • (((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁) ▹ f))
• rassociator
    (f /≃₁
     comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
          (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))) π₁
    f = ?y'

(((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁ · f)
 • lassociator

       π₁ f) = ?y'

        
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁ · f)
• id₂
    (f /≃₁
     comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
          (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
     · (π₁ · f)) = ?y'

        apply id2_right.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁ · f)
• (f /≃₁
   comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
   ◃ pb_cell f g₃) =
(f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂ · g₃)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂ · g₃) =
(f /≃₁ α₁ · (f /≃₁ β) ◃ pb_cell f g₃)
• ((pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂ · g₃)

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
(pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₁ =
((f /≃₂ p ▹ f /≃₁ β) • pb_1cell_on_comp f α₂ β) ▹ π₁
 
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
(pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β ▹ π₁) • (f /≃₂ q ▹ π₁) =
((f /≃₂ p ▹ f /≃₁ β) ▹ π₁)
• (pb_1cell_on_comp f α₂ β ▹ π₁)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
(((rassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
   • (f /≃₁ α₁ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
  • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₁)
 • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
   ^-1)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃)))
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))))
     ^-1) =
((f /≃₂ p ▹ f /≃₁ β) ▹ π₁)
• (((rassociator (f /≃₁ α₂) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
     • (f /≃₁ α₂ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
    • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₂)
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))))
     ^-1)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
    • (f /≃₁ α₁ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
   • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₁)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
    ^-1)
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))))
  ^-1 =
(((((f /≃₂ p ▹ f /≃₁ β) ▹ π₁)
   • rassociator (f /≃₁ α₂) (f /≃₁ β) π₁)
  • (f /≃₁ α₂ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))))
  ^-1

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧

h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
    • (f /≃₁ α₁ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
   • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₁)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
    ^-1)
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))))
  ^-1 =
(((rassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
   • (f /≃₂ p ▹ f /≃₁ β · π₁))
  • (f /≃₁ α₂ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₂)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))))
  ^-1

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
(((rassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
   • (f /≃₁ α₁ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
  • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₁)
 • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
   ^-1)
• pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
    (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
          (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))) =
((rassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
  • (f /≃₂ p ▹ f /≃₁ β · π₁))
 • (f /≃₁ α₂ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
• pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
rassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
• ((f /≃₁ α₁ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₁
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                  (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃
                     g₃)))) ^-1
         • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃
                      g₃)))))) =
rassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) (f /≃₁ β) π₁
• ((f /≃₂ p ▹ f /≃₁ β · π₁)
   • ((f /≃₁ α₂ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)
      • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₂))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α₁ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₁
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
      ^-1
      • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))) =
(f /≃₂ p ▹ f /≃₁ β · π₁)
• ((f /≃₁ α₂ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)
   • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α₁ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₁ • id₂ π₁) =
(f /≃₂ p ▹ f /≃₁ β · π₁)
• ((f /≃₁ α₂ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)
   • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α₁ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)
• pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₁ =
(f /≃₂ p ▹ f /≃₁ β · π₁)
• ((f /≃₁ α₂ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)
   • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧

h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α₁ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)
• pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₁ =
((f /≃₂ p ▹ f /≃₁ β · π₁)
 • (f /≃₁ α₂ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β))
• pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α₁ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)
• pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₁ =
((f /≃₁ α₁ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β) • (f /≃₂ p ▹ π₁))
• pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))

comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α₁ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)
• pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₁ =
((f /≃₁ α₁ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)
 • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₁ • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₂) ^-1))
• pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₂

(f /≃₁ α₁ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f β)

B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)

     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₁ =
pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₁
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₂) ^-1 • pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₂)

     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₁ = pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₁ • id₂ π₁

a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B

g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧

h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell

     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₁ = pb_on_1cell_pr1 f α₁

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
(pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β • f /≃₂ q) ▹ π₂ =
((f /≃₂ p ▹ f /≃₁ β) • pb_1cell_on_comp f α₂ β) ▹ π₂
 
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
(pb_1cell_on_comp f α₁ β ▹ π₂) • (f /≃₂ q ▹ π₂) =
((f /≃₂ p ▹ f /≃₁ β) ▹ π₂)
• (pb_1cell_on_comp f α₂ β ▹ π₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
(((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
     • (f /≃₁ α₁ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
    • lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) π₂ h₃)
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₁ ▹ h₃))
  • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃)
 • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
   ^-1)
• ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃)))
    • (π₂ ◃ (γ ▹ h₃)))
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))))
     ^-1) =
((f /≃₂ p ▹ f /≃₁ β) ▹ π₂)
• (((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α₂) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
       • (f /≃₁ α₂ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
      • lassociator (f /≃₁ α₂) π₂ h₃)
     • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₂ ▹ h₃))
    • rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))))
     ^-1)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
(((((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
       • (f /≃₁ α₁ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
      • lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) π₂ h₃)
     • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₁ ▹ h₃))
    • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃)
   • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
     ^-1)
  • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
 • (π₂ ◃ (γ ▹ h₃)))
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))))
  ^-1 =
(((((((f /≃₂ p ▹ f /≃₁ β) ▹ π₂)
     • rassociator (f /≃₁ α₂) (f /≃₁ β) π₂)
    • (f /≃₁ α₂ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α₂) π₂ h₃)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₂ ▹ h₃))
 • rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))))
  ^-1

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
((((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
      • (f /≃₁ α₁ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
     • lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) π₂ h₃)
    • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₁ ▹ h₃))
   • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
    ^-1)
 • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
• (π₂ ◃ (γ ▹ h₃)) =
((((((f /≃₂ p ▹ f /≃₁ β) ▹ π₂)
    • rassociator (f /≃₁ α₂) (f /≃₁ β) π₂)
   • (f /≃₁ α₂ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α₂) π₂ h₃)
 • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₂ ▹ h₃)) • rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
((((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
      • (f /≃₁ α₁ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
     • lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) π₂ h₃)
    • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₁ ▹ h₃))
   • rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
    ^-1)
 • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))))
• (π₂ ◃ (γ ▹ h₃)) =
((((rassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
    • (f /≃₂ p ▹ f /≃₁ β · π₂))
   • (f /≃₁ α₂ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α₂) π₂ h₃)
 • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₂ ▹ h₃)) • rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
rassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
• ((f /≃₁ α₁ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) π₂ h₃
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₁ ▹ h₃)
         • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃
            • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
                     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                           h₁ β)
                        (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                           h₁ h₃ g₃)))) ^-1
               • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                             h₁ β)
                          (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                             h₁ h₃ g₃)))
                  • (π₂ ◃ (γ ▹ h₃)))))))) =
rassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) (f /≃₁ β) π₂
• ((f /≃₂ p ▹ f /≃₁ β · π₂)
   • ((f /≃₁ α₂ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α₂) π₂ h₃
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₂ ▹ h₃)
            • rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃))))

α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)

q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)

comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
(f /≃₁ α₁ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) π₂ h₃
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₁ ▹ h₃)
      • (rassociator π₂ h₁ h₃
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁
                        β)
                     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁
                        h₃ g₃)))) ^-1
            • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                          h₁ β)
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          h₁ h₃ g₃)))
               • (π₂ ◃ (γ ▹ h₃))))))) =
(f /≃₂ p ▹ f /≃₁ β · π₂)
• ((f /≃₁ α₂ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α₂) π₂ h₃
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₂ ▹ h₃)
         • rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)))

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) π₂ h₃
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₁ ▹ h₃)

(f /≃₂ p ▹ f /≃₁ β · π₂)

• (lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) π₂ h₃
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₁ ▹ h₃)
      • (((π₂ ◃ γ) ▹ h₃) • rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃))) =
(f /≃₂ p ▹ f /≃₁ β · π₂)
• ((f /≃₁ α₂ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
   • (lassociator (f /≃₁ α₂) π₂ h₃
      • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₂ ▹ h₃)
         • rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
((((f /≃₁ α₁ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
   • lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) π₂ h₃)
  • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₁ ▹ h₃)) • ((π₂ ◃ γ) ▹ h₃))
• rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃ =
((((f /≃₂ p ▹ f /≃₁ β · π₂)
   • (f /≃₁ α₂ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α₂) π₂ h₃)
 • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₂ ▹ h₃)) • rassociator π₂ h₂ h₃

(((f /≃₁ α₁ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β)
  • lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) π₂ h₃)
 • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₁ ▹ h₃)) • ((π₂ ◃ γ) ▹ h₃) =
(((f /≃₂ p ▹ f /≃₁ β · π₂)
  • (f /≃₁ α₂ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f β))
 • lassociator (f /≃₁ α₂) π₂ h₃)
• (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₂ ▹ h₃)

α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)

q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁

q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁

lassociator (f /≃₁ α₁) π₂ h₃
• (((f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂) ▹ h₃) • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₂ ▹ h₃))

a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧

h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁

     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)

(pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₁ ▹ h₃) • ((π₂ ◃ γ) ▹ h₃) =
((f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂) ▹ h₃) • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₂ ▹ h₃)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧

h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)

• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
(pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₁ • (π₂ ◃ γ)) ▹ h₃ =
((f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂) • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₂) ▹ h₃

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧

h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₁ • (π₂ ◃ γ) =
(f /≃₂ p ▹ π₂) • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₁ • (π₂ ◃ γ) =
((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₁ • (π₂ ◃ γ))
 • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₂) ^-1) • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧

h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₁ • (π₂ ◃ γ) =
pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₁
• ((π₂ ◃ γ)
   • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₂) ^-1
      • pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₂))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ a₂, b₂ ⟧
g₃: B ⟦ a₃, b₂ ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
α₁: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₁ · g₂)
α₂: invertible_2cell g₁ (h₂ · g₂)
β: invertible_2cell g₂ (h₃ · g₃)
γ: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α₁ • (γ ▹ g₂) = α₂
q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₁ • (π₂ ◃ γ) =
pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₁ • ((π₂ ◃ γ) • id₂ (π₂ · h₂))

a₁, a₂, a₃, b₁, b₂: B

g₁: B ⟦ a₁, b₂ ⟧

q: comp_of_invertible_2cell α₁
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₁ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₁ h₃ g₃))
• ((γ ▹ h₃) ▹ g₃) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell α₂
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell h₂ β)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell h₂ h₃ g₃))
pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₁ • (π₂ ◃ γ) =
pb_on_1cell_pr2 f α₁ • (π₂ ◃ γ)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.
End Functions.

Module Notations.
  Notation "f '/≃' g" := (pb_obj f g) (at level 40).
  Notation "'π₁'" := (pb_pr1 _ _).
  Notation "'π₂'" := (pb_pr2 _ _).
  Notation "h₁ ⊗[ γ ] h₂" := (mor_to_pb_obj h₁ h₂ γ) (at level 10).
  Notation "f /≃₁ β" := (pb_on_1cell f β) (at level 40).
  Notation "f /≃₂ p" := (pb_on_2cell f p) (at level 40).
End Notations.
